faqs.question: Are there any specializations offered by Jawaharlal Nehru Government Engineering College?
faqs.answer: Jawaharlal Nehru Government Engineering College is a good institution for M.E./M.Tech, B.E. / B.Tech courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at Jawaharlal Nehru Government Engineering College are Construction Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Civil Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Textile Engineering.

faqs.question: Is it worth to consider Jawaharlal Nehru Government Engineering College as a good Institute?
faqs.answer: Jawaharlal Nehru Government Engineering College is a renowned institution offering M.E./M.Tech, B.E. / B.Tech. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Engineering. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. Jawaharlal Nehru Government Engineering College boasts an impressive review rating of 3.53 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 3.89 for Campus Life, 2.5 for Placements, 3.93 for Faculty, and 3.72 for Infrastructure.

placements.overview: UG Degree (4 year) : In year 2017-18, for 4 year UG Degree, a total of 209 students were admitted at Jawaharlal Nehru Government Engineering College and 168 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 168 students 34 were placed with median salary of INR 270000 and 25 students opted for higher studies. A total of 206 students were admitted in year 2018-19 for 4 year UG degree at Jawaharlal Nehru Government Engineering Collegeand 160 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 160 students 65 were placed with median salary of INR 400000 and 20 students opted for higher studies.

faqs.answer: A:    The median salary granted to students upon a successful placement from the Jawaharlal Nehru Government Engineering College is INR 2.25 LPA, indicating the institution's commitment to fostering prosperous career beginnings, with graduates receiving a commendable financial remuneration.

The college is mainly concerned with stream such as Engineering. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech. Jawaharlal Nehru Government Engineering College courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Jawaharlal Nehru Government Engineering College courses stands around INR 2,20,000 to 2,34,850.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Different side of Jawaharlal Nehru Government Engineering College.

review_content.Placements: There are very low placements and the students who are placed only belong to textile engineering. There are no other placements at any other branch. Even if there, they are very small not many companies come to our college only textile engineering.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel for girls only for boys. There is good structure okay but not that good or that bad. It is on top of a hill and there is no college transportation for students still, it is one of the top colleges in Himachal. There is no good college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good but average college here.

review_content.Placements: Well, there are 76 students in our course in civil engineering. Well talking about placements, don't have much expectations. Only the textile course here can have you a placement with the highest package 18 LPA and average is around 1 LPA. There are training programs also in the final year.
review_content.Infrastructure: Well, we have good infrastructure for the hostel and college. Talking about mess food it's not that much appreciable. Fee for the mess is average of Rs 3000 per month. Talking about the hostel fee it's around Rs 8000 per year with good infrastructure and friendly seniors.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Welcome to Jawaharlal Nehru Government College.

review_content.Placements: There are 76 students in our Civil Engineering course. Talking about placements, I don't have much expectation. Only the Textile course here can offer a placement with the highest package of 18 LPA and an average LPA of around 1 LPA. There are training programs also in the final year.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have good infrastructure for both the hostel and the college. Talking about the mess food, it's not that much appreciable. The fee for the mess is an average of Rs. 3000 per month. Talking about the hostel fees, it's around Rs. 8000 per year with good infrastructure and friendly seniors.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: My college is JNGEC Sundernagar.

review_content.Placements: Only textile students have placement options. Other courses do get placed but with very low packages. For textile students, the highest package is 12 LPA, whereas for others, the highest package is only up to 5 LPA. It depends on your presentation skills.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are hostels only for boys, and not for girls. The infrastructure is also not that favorable, as it is a very small campus with very little space for students to hang out. The food quality in the boys' mess is also not good, as I've heard from my friends.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Not satisfied with infrastructure and college life.

review_content.Placements: CSE (AI and ML) in this college started recently in 2022, that's why they do not have any record till now for placements. The first batch of this course is in 3rd year now, maybe next year we can get some information about placements in the CSE branch. Whereas other branches placements are average and mostly the textile branch has the highest package till now. Companies like TCS visit mostly.
review_content.Infrastructure: I have already told that this is a new course here, so facilities like infrastructure and labs are still not that good. They may extend it with time. Classrooms and library are quite good as we expected. There is shortage of teachers currently in CSE only. Hostel facility is available. The quality of food is average according to the fees they take. Canteen facility is available and it is good. Medical facility is not so good but the college is near a government and private hospital. Sports are available but do not have enough ground.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Textile Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Jawaharlal Nehru Government engineering College review.

review_content.Placements: Almost 100% of students got placements on our college campus. The highest salary package offered is 12 LPA. The average salary package offered is 9 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 6 LPA. Around 80-90% of students got internships at IIT Mandi and other companies. Students got good knowledge.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good. The building of our college is very good and big. The hostel of our college is good. The closing time of our college hostel is 9:00 PM. The food quality of our hostel mess is very tasty. There is also a gym in our hostel.

paragraphs: Jawaharlal Nehru Government Engineering College admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Jawaharlal Nehru Government Engineering Collegeoffers courses at UG and PG levels. Some of the courses include B.E. / B.Tech and M.E./M.Tech. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 2,20,000 - 2,34,850. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 4 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years.

reviews.review_heading: Jawaharlal Nehru Government engineering College review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. The building of our college is very good and big. The hostel of our college is good. The closing time of our college hostel is 9:00 PM. The food quality of our hostel mess is very tasty. There is also a gym in our hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Genuine review of JNGEC.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the hostel and college is very nice, but Wi-Fi is not available in the college or the hostel, and the mess is very poor. The classrooms are spacious and nice. The surroundings are very green and provide plenty of fresh air.

reviews.review_heading: Review for JNGEC Sundernagar: good surrounding, poor mess food.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi inside the college and hostel for students. Labs are normal, and classrooms are a bit old-fashioned. There is a scarcity of benches in class, and most of the projectors in class don't work. The library is average, but there are no non-fiction books available. No medical facilities are provided in our hostel, and no games happen inside the hostel—only some cricket tournaments take place. The mess food is very poor as it comes under private tender.

reviews.review_heading: Career building college
reviews.review_text: There is free Wi-Fi available in my college. Classrooms are really big and well-decorated. The library provides almost every book in the book slots for every course, and the hostel rooms are really good, though the food is average. The hostel provides an indoor tennis court.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure affordable and beautiful surroundings.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good and well-maintained. There are many classrooms equipped with projectors and labs with most of the necessary equipment. The campus has Wi-Fi, and the computer center has many computers. There are labs for most subjects, a three-story library with books related to the course, and a separate computer section with access to DELNET and Wi-Fi. The newly built boys' hostel is good in terms of both infrastructure and facilities. It has its own separate badminton...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jawaharlal Nehru Government Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is huge. The building is neat and clean. There is a very good learning atmosphere for students. The campus is huge. Wi-Fi is accessible to all students. There is also a very good library where a lot of books are available. Hostels are under construction. The quality of food in the canteen is fine.

reviews.review_heading: You'll be satisfied with academics and faculty support but not by extra-curricular activities.
reviews.review_text: College has internet access but Wi-Fi is not up to the mark. Library  (that offers free books for students and fast internet) as well as labs are very good. Classrooms are spacious and airy. Hostel is under construction. Quality of food in canteen is okay and there is no sports ground available in campus.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is not a good college in my knowledge.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. Only one building is there on campus, and there are no better lab facilities.  There is no hostel facility. The hostel is under construction for the last 6 years. There are no medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It is the number 1 engineering college in HP.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi on campus. The college is located on the top of a hill, so students have to struggle every morning to reach college. The hostel is under construction. 75% attendance is mandatory for every student in each subject to attend the exams.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college with staff and facilities.
reviews.review_text: In this college, the hostel is under construction, so there is no availability of any hostel. Students have to stay in PGs or rooms provided by the local people. The infrastructure of this college is very good, and all the required facilities are provided which are essential for the studies of a student.

review_content.Placements: We don't have on-campus placement; they mostly provide information about many companies' drives to apply online. There is no 90% placement. content.Placements: Placements at this college are not very good. Only 30% of students got placements. The average salary package offered is 3.2 LPA. Companies like TCS and Infosys visit our college to recruit students. They also don't provide free internships to their students.

admission_process.title: Future Institute of Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Future Institute of Technology admission 2025 is open for BTech. The college offers one course i.e. BTech at UG level.Future Institute of Technologycarried out the application in online mode. Admission to BTech is entrance-based. The institute is affiliated withMaulana Abul Kalam Azad University of Technology (MAKAUT), so the institute follows its admission norms for admission to its courses. All the information related to Future Institute of Technology admission, along with course eligibility and selection criteria is available in the following segments.

Future Institute of Technology admission is entrance-based for courses offered at UG level. Candidates are required to fill out the basic eligibility criteria to get admission to BTech. The institute offers admission to BTech based on the WBJEE / JEE exam. The table below listsFuture Institute of Technology courseseligibility and selection criteria:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Class 10 and Class 12 with 45% aggregate from a recognised board
WBJEE/JEE Main+ Centralised Counselling

Future Institute of Technology admission process 2025is open for all courses. The college offers entrance-based admission to BTech. Candidates must complete the admission process for admission. Check below theFuture Institute of Technology admission process 2025:
Step 1: Future Institute of Technology Application Process 2025
For registration, candidates need to apply on the official website of the respective entrance exams. The mode of application for all the courses is online.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Future Institute of Technology shortlists candidates for BTech courses based on the entrance exam. The college considers entrance exams such as WBJEE, and JEE Main for admission to BTech. Given below are seats distributed by the college according to different parameters:
10% of Seats are filled up from JEE Main through centralized counselling.
80% of Seats are filled up from WBJEE through centralized counselling.
10% of Seats are filled up through Management quota. (Subject to course-wise prior approval)
Step 3: Final Seat Allotment/Fee Submission

Once the selection rounds are completed, the Future Institute of Technology releases a merit list to announce the names of the shortlisted candidates. Such aspirants are further called for document verification. Aspirants need to pay the Future Institute of Technology fee to confirm their seat in the university.

The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

Future Institute of Technology cutoff 2025 was released via WBJEE entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 343122 and 1259605 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 343122, B.Tech. in Civil Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 343122.

reviews.review_heading: Choose wisely as your future depends on it.
reviews.review_text: Our college has spacious and well-ventilated classrooms equipped with projectors. Some classrooms have smart boards. In some classrooms, projectors don't work. There is a networking lab and a cloud computing lab but equipment needs some upgradation. The college has separate hostels for boys and girls with single, double, and triple-sharing rooms. Mess facilities are available but their meals are not very delicious.

reviews.review_heading: A good campus for all purposes.
reviews.review_text: In our college, classrooms, a lab, and other things are very good and well-maintained. Our college should improve the canteen food and the main entrance of the college. There is no hostel on this campus.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of poor placement.2024.
reviews.review_text: They don't provide us with Wi-Fi on the campus, but the labs and classrooms are clean and airy. I loved our library; it's a good place to read books. The college doesn't have its own hostel, but there are plenty of PGs and hostels for both genders where students stay to study. The food quality at the canteen is good; most students from the hostels do their lunch here.

reviews.review_heading: Really Good College to choose.
reviews.review_text: The college building has sufficient space for each individual departments. It has no hostel of its own. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. There is a canteen to hill with friends between the classes. Every department has its own seperate labs .

reviews.review_heading: I am completely content with my college and eagerly anticipate making more cherished memories here.
reviews.review_text: The campus is ragging-free and well established, with all the necessary items and outstanding security facilities. Classrooms are spacious and airy, with vast amounts of tables and chairs. Labs are classified according to the department and have all necessary equipment. The campus has two separate playgrounds, medical facilities, separate gaming rooms, a library, a canteen, and—most importantly—accessible Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: Student friendly ambiance.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite above average in this college. Really spacious and airy classrooms and wide corridors with two playgrounds. The labs are well-equipped. There are multiple computer labs in the college and each of them are connected to the Wi-Fi. The food available in the canteen is fresh and well cooked at a very reasonable price. There is no hostel facility in this college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college with remarkable infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: It is a well-established college with excellent infrastructure and security facilities. It has an indoor games room and a stationery shop. The campus is ragging-free. It has smart classrooms, a seminar hall, Wi-Fi, a library, a canteen, and labs.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are good as of 2023, Faculties are fine, good campus life and modern laboratories.
reviews.review_text: I am not a hostel student, I travel from my home. Regarding the Infrastructure, I would say that the labs are very good and modern as the college is fairly new. It has a fairly big playground. Every year college tournaments of cricket, badminton, and football are organized. The canteen food is fairly good. The college has its own xerox centre, so it is possible to quickly print or xerox a document. The library inventory is big, but the books are fairly old and not quite up to date with the moder...

reviews.review_heading: Everything is average in this college.
reviews.review_text: Laboratory, Wi-Fi, and library are very good. The library is average. Our college does not provide hostels. Our college should provide a PG facility. The food served in the canteen is good. Medical facilities are not available. Sports and games are decent.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is good but it needs also better .
reviews.review_text: There are few Wi-Fi router available for study, classrooms are well maintained, library are also available, in quality of hostel is good, the quality of food in canteen is quiet good, medical facilities are not also well organised, the sports and games specially for interested students .

reviews.review_heading: Good college with quality faculty and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided in our college are good. There is Wi-Fi available in our college, however it provides limited data. Classrooms are good and can accommodate nearly 60 students. Labs are well-developed with all up-to-date equipments. Canteen is fine and provides fresh food. Hostel facilities are not available. Sports and games events are often organised.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college for average students.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are not provided in our college. Private hostel and PGs are available. The infrastructure is good. The food quality is average. Our PG owner is very helpful.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very quite pocket-friendly to complete  your engineering.
reviews.review_text: Every single facility is available in our college. Wi-Fi, different laboratories, good classrooms and a library are available. You don't need to buy any book from outside, as every required book is available in the library.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college due to its faculty and placement.
reviews.review_text: There is free Wi-Fi all over our campus. All types of labs and clean classrooms are present for all departments. There is a very big library with availability of a number of books. There is no hostel. The college has a big canteen which provides best food. Medicine facilities are there. Different sports are available and the college also organizes sports competitions.

reviews.review_heading: All teachers in our college are friendly so students grow up fast.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides technical labs, vast classrooms, and an efficient library with a lot of books. Our college has a hygienic and well-maintained canteen. Our college organises annual sports each year.

reviews_list.review_title: The college has a good campus life and facilities, although the administrative processes are slow.

review_content.Placements: I am reviewing this after doing deep research on the campus. The placement cell is genuinely okay for students who want a boost in their success. As it is a tier-3 college, the placement is above 40%. The careers are making around 4-6 LPA. Students get placed in both mass recruitment and some diligent corporations like Deloitte, HCL, Flipkart, etc., specializing in web development and AI. The field is further improving.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel infrastructure is nice. Facilities like Wi-Fi and laundry are also available. The mess food provided is okay. Medical facilities include collaboration with a local hospital, which is available 24/7. Sports infrastructure is good, with grounds for volleyball, cricket, and other extracurricular activities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Post Graduate Diploma in Management (PGDM) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Supportive faculty and helpful environment .

review_content.Placements: GIMS maintains a strong 90–93 percent placement rate. The highest package is around 12.5 LPA, and the average package is 5.8–7 LPA. Top recruiters include Amazon, EY, and HDFC. About 90 percent of students also secure internships in companies like TCS, Demandbase, and NCS Private Limited.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty in our course is very supportive, qualified, and approachable. Their teaching style is easy to understand. They use real life examples. It makes learning easy. The curriculum is relevant and keeps us updated with industry skills if you attend classes regularly and study with consistency. It is a very good learning experience overall with supportive faculty and a helpful environment. The curriculum is great with good teaching quality.

review_summary.college_name: GN Group of Institutes Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in CSE (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Neither the worst nor best, but worth the money you spend.

content.Placements: Around 20% of students were placed in the AI & ML program. I'm a first-year student, so I can't be sure what package I will have in the near future, but I have witnessed seniors getting packages of 3-4 LPA and maxing out at around 6-7 LPA. Infosys is one of our active recruiters. As for internships, almost every student gets an internship, whether paid or unpaid, depending on their skills.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and hostel facilities are not top-notch, but they are worth the money. You can access Wi-Fi throughout the campus. As for hostels, you will receive your own personal Wi-Fi. Hostels, library, and classrooms are fully air-conditioned, and hostels provide mess and transport facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. LL.B. - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members of the college are so supportive and helpful.

content.Placements: B.Com LL.B is a law course, and 90 percent of students continue their internship on their own references, and it does not need any placement to get internships or practice in courts, so there's no need for placement. For students who are interested in corporate, the college provides contact with corporate firms to help students.
content.Infrastructure: The college has Wi-Fi facility, well-oriented and well-maintained classrooms, smart classrooms, corridors, and a library where students can find many types of books according to their interests and needs. I honestly didn't know about the mess because I'm doing it from my hometown. The college has 2-3 canteens. It also has medical facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college has a good campus life and facilities, although the administrative processes are slow.

content.Placements: I am reviewing this after doing deep research on the campus. The placement cell is genuinely okay for students who want a boost in their success. As it is a tier-3 college, the placement is above 40%. The careers are making around 4-6 LPA. Students get placed in both mass recruitment and some diligent corporations like Deloitte, HCL, Flipkart, etc., specializing in web development and AI. The field is further improving.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel infrastructure is nice. Facilities like Wi-Fi and laundry are also available. The mess food provided is okay. Medical facilities include collaboration with a local hospital, which is available 24/7. Sports infrastructure is good, with grounds for volleyball, cricket, and other extracurricular activities.

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduate Diploma in Management (PGDM) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Supportive faculty and helpful environment .

content.Placements: GIMS maintains a strong 90–93 percent placement rate. The highest package is around 12.5 LPA, and the average package is 5.8–7 LPA. Top recruiters include Amazon, EY, and HDFC. About 90 percent of students also secure internships in companies like TCS, Demandbase, and NCS Private Limited.
content.Faculty: Faculty in our course is very supportive, qualified, and approachable. Their teaching style is easy to understand. They use real life examples. It makes learning easy. The curriculum is relevant and keeps us updated with industry skills if you attend classes regularly and study with consistency. It is a very good learning experience overall with supportive faculty and a helpful environment. The curriculum is great with good teaching quality.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Infrastructure is very good.

content.Placements: Placement is awesome at this college. About 90% of students are placed. Top recruiting companies are TCL, Wipro, Tech Mahindra, etc. Top roles offered are front-end developer, AI engineer, tester, and UI/UX designer. The highest package is 40 LPA, and the lowest is 5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Labs and classrooms are awesome. The quality of food is very good in the hostel. The college organized sports and hackathons from time to time. Students also have access the board games like chess, etc., anytime.

admission_overview.college_name: GN Group of Institutes Course Admissions 2026: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

admission_process.title: GN Group of Institutes Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: GN Group of Institutes (GNIT-IPU) admissions 2025are open for courses in Pharmacy, with distinct specialisations in Science, Medicine & Health Sciences, Accounting and Commerce, IT & Software, etc. These are BBA, BCA, BTech, BCom, BPharm, MBA, LLB, BA LLB, etc., given in the universities-AKTU,GGSIPU&CCSU. GN Group of Institutes admissions depends on bothmerit and entrance. For admission to BTech and MBA courses, the institute accepts scores of entrance exams, likewiseJEE Main, CAT, MAT, XAT, etc., respectively. The students wanting to get admission to the college can apply online through the institute's verified website.
Check out the column below for admission details of theGN Group of Institutes:
Particulars
GN Group of Institutes Admission Highlights 2024
Mode of study
Admission Status
How to apply?
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

GNIT-IPU admission is depends on merit for most of the courses. However, for courses like BTech, the college accepts a score ofJEE Main. Further, the shortlisted candidates are given seats through the counselling process as per the guidelines of the respective affiliating universities. Check below the eligibility, fee and selection criteria for theGN Group of Institutes course admissions:
Eligibility:Bachelor's degree course with at least 50% aggregate
Selection Criteria:Merit-based +CAT/CMAT/MAT/XAT/ATMA
Eligibility:Class 12 or equivalent with at least 45% aggregate
Selection Criteria:Merit-based
Eligibility:Class 12 or equivalent with at least 45% aggregate for General and OBC (40% aggregate for SC/ ST) for Greater Noida College
Class 12 with at least 55% aggregate in PCM for Greater Noida Institute of Technology
Selection Criteria:JEE Main/ JEECUP + Counselling
Eligibility:Class 12 or equivalent with at least 45% aggregate withMathematics
Selection Criteria:Merit-based + Counselling as per CCSU
Eligibility:3 years bachelor's degree with minimum 45% aggregate
Selection Criteria:Merit-based + Counselling as per CCSU
Eligibility:Class 12 with at least 44.5% aggregate
Selection Criteria:Merit-based + Counselling as per CCSU
The admission process for GNIT-IPU is a detailed process inclusive of application, appearance in the selection rounds, offline admission process, and document verification.

Application Form:Interested students shoul start by filling out the official application form, which is available on the website or can get from the admission office. Students should pay an application fee, i.e., Rs.1,000 for each course. The application fee for PGDM isINR 2,000.

Eligibility Criteria:Students should review and meet the eligibility criteria specified for the respective courses. This may has minimum educational qualifications, subject prerequisites, and other specific requirements.
Merit-Based Selection:Admission to some courses depends on merit, considering the candidate's academic performance in qualifying examinations.

Submission of Documents:Shortlisted students are required to submit documents, including educational certificates, identification proof, and passport-sized photographs, as part of the verification process.

Fee Payment:Once selected, candidates should complete the admission formalities by paying the prescribed fees within the stipulated time frame. Details about the fee structure are provided in the admission brochure.
Orientation:Admitted students may be required to attend an orientation program, where they will receive essential information about the institute, academic policies, and other details.

For admission to this programme, candidates need to apply through the official website of the institute. Find below more details about the GNIT-IPU BBA programme:

faqs.question: What is the eligibility requirements for the BBA programme at GN Group of Institutes?
faqs.answer: The eligibility criteria for BBA at GN Group of Institutes is 45% aggregate from recognised board in Class 12 or equivalent. Admission is on merit basis and for SC/ST category students 40% aggregate in Class 12 is required. Candidates ensure all the requirements are fulfilled before starting the admission process. BBA at GN Group of Institutes is a three years undergraduate programme of six semesters.

faqs.question: What documents are required for the admission for UG programme at GN Group of Institutes?
faqs.answer: Candidates willing to get admission to UG course at GN Group of Institutes must fill an online application form.  The list of the required docuements are mentioned below:Four copies of photograph of studentTwo copies of photograph of parentOne copy of fee reciept deposited at the time of counsellingClass 10 and Class 12 marksheetDiploma/ graduation marksheetOne copy of domicile certificate (if applicable)Original transfer certificiate/ migration certificateOne copy of caste certificiate (if appl

faqs.question: Is MBA available at GN Group of Institutes?
faqs.answer: Yes, GN Group of Institutes offer a full-timeMBA(Elite) via GNIT College of Management. This course is approved by AICTE, New Delhi and offered in affiliation with Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam Technical University (AKTU). It is a dual specialisations course. Students can choose among the following specialisations:Marketing, Human Resources, Information Technology, International Business, Operations Management, and Finance.The total seat intake for MBA is 120. While pursuing an MBA at GN Group of Institutes, students also receive additional certification and training opportunities.

faqs.question: Which courses does GN Group of Institutes offer?
faqs.answer: GN Group of Institutes offers various UG, PG and Diploma and integrated courses, ranging from duration of two to five years. The GN Group offers courses via its various colleges in the streams of Management, Law, Engineering ad Pharmacy. These are BBA, BCA, BTech, BCom, BPharm, DPharm, PGDM, MBA, LLB, BA LLB, BCom LLB, etc. All of its courses are offered in affiliation with AKTU, GGSIPU & CCSU and approved by AICTE, PCI, BCI and BTE.

faqs.question: What are the qualification requirements for BCA at GN Group of Institutes?
faqs.answer: For admission to BCA course at GN Group of Institutes, candidates must pass Class 12 with minimum of 45% aggregatefrom a recognised board as per the required eligibility for this course. It is a mandatory step to qualify before applying for this course. Candidates must also have Mathematics at Class 12 level. Admission to BCA is completely based on merit in the last qualifying exam.

faqs.question: Is CUET exam registration open?
faqs.answer: Yes, Common University Entrance Test (CUET) 2026 registration commenced at cuet.nta.nic.in. NTA released the CUET 2026 notification on January 03 and reopened the window on February 23. Soon after the release of the CUET official notification, theCUET registration 2026process commenced online at the official website. Candidates willing to appear for the CUET 2026 exam must have completed complete the application form online. Additionally, before filling application form, candidates must make sure that they have fulfilled the prescribedCUET eligibility criteriato qualify for the entrance exam.

faqs.question: What is the salary package offered to MBA students in GN Group of Institutes placement drive?
faqs.answer: GNIT College of Management, a constituent unit of GN Group of Institutes, offers MBA Elite programme to eligible applicants. Students enrolled in the programme are offered placement opportunities through the campus placement drives. Based on the college's placement report for the year 2023, the average salary package offered to MBA students ranged between INR 10 LPA and INR 15 LPA. The highest salary package recorded during the same year was INR 50 LPA.

faqs.question: Are there any government jobs that I can seek after pursuing an MBA at GN Group of Institutes?
faqs.answer: Yes, GN Group of Institutes graduates have a plethora of career opportunities after pursuing an MBA . MBA degree holders get a recognised degree from AKTU, which makes them eligible for various jobs in the government sector. These jobs provide job security, recognition, and good salary packages among various other perks. Tabulated below are some of the job profiles for students to pursue after completion of MBA at GN Group of Institutes: Government Job Profiles after an MBA Reserve Bank of India (RBI) Grade B Officer Indian Railways Management Service (IRMS) Central Excise and Customs Inspector (C&CE) Security and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) Grade A Officer Probationary Officer in Banks Quality Assurance Manager

faqs.question: What is the fee structure for B.Com course at the GN Group of Institutes?
faqs.answer: BCom course fee structure at GN Group of Institutes includes tuition, hostel and one-time payment. The tuition fee for BCom is INR 1.4 lakhs. The hostel fee is INR 2.55 lakhs. Consists of an application fee of INR 1,000. The total amount involved, thus integrating all the fee components, will come to approximately INR 3.93 lakhs. The mentioned fee is taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and, hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: What is the course fees for the two-year MBA in GN Group of Institutes?
faqs.answer: GN Group of Institutes MBA fee structure is a cumulative of the various components, such as such as the tuition fees, one-time fees, registration fees, and exam fees, among others. Tuition fee is the most major component included in the fee structure. The total tuition fee for the two-year MBA programme at GN Group of Institutes is INR 2.46 lakh. It is divided into equal annual instalments of INR 1.23 lakh. This amount also includes the charges for the Book Bank. NOTE: The mentioned fees are sourced from the official website of the institute/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Greater Noida Institute of Technology, IPUReviewed on 11 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Neither the worst nor best, but worth the money you spend.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and hostel facilities are not top-notch, but they are worth the money. You can access Wi-Fi throughout the campus. As for hostels, you will receive your own personal Wi-Fi. Hostels, library, and classrooms are fully air-conditioned, and hostels provide mess and transport facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members of the college are so supportive and helpful.
reviews.review_text: The college has Wi-Fi facility, well-oriented and well-maintained classrooms, smart classrooms, corridors, and a library where students can find many types of books according to their interests and needs. I honestly didn't know about the mess because I'm doing it from my hometown. The college has 2-3 canteens. It also has medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The college has a good campus life and facilities, although the administrative processes are slow.
reviews.review_text: The hostel infrastructure is nice. Facilities like Wi-Fi and laundry are also available. The mess food provided is okay. Medical facilities include collaboration with a local hospital, which is available 24/7. Sports infrastructure is good, with grounds for volleyball, cricket, and other extracurricular activities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Greater Noida Institute of ManagementReviewed on 22 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading:
Supportive faculty and helpful environment 
 
.

About 90 percent of students also secure internships in companies like TCS, Demandbase, and NCS Private Limited.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is very good.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms are awesome. The quality of food is very good in the hostel. The college organized sports and hackathons from time to time. Students also have access the board games like chess, etc., anytime.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Greater Noida Institute of ManagementReviewed on 10 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges.
reviews.review_text: The college has very good infrastructure and facilities. They have AC rooms and labs. A very high-protein food is available in the canteen and mess. There are good medical facilities and a good playing ground on this campus. All facilities are good, and it is one of the best colleges.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Greater Noida Institute of Technology, IPUReviewed on 11 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: GNIT (IPU) has great infrastructure as well as educated teachers.
reviews.review_text: The structure is quite good. There is a lot of greenery as well as dedicated classrooms, common rooms, and sports facilities, which is impressive. All the labs are very advanced, and the library has a collection of more than fifty thousand books.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are helpful and knowledgeable.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities for students. Classrooms are clean and spacious. The library has a decent collection of books. Wi-Fi is available on campus, but the speed is average. Every week, one day is fixed for student presentations, which helps improve confidence. The canteen food is okay. Medical facilities are available for basic needs. Sports and games are organized from time to time, but more regular activities would be better. Overall, infrastructure is good but can be improved w...

reviews.review_heading: Good college life and exposure to co-operates world.
reviews.review_text: I would say the infrastructure is average because the classrooms and auditorium are pretty nice for students. If someone wants to study, the library is also good, as you can take some extra books beyond your course. However, I think the computers are not well-equipped because some of them lack an internet connection, and VS Code is also not installed.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Greater Noida Institute of Technology, IPUReviewed on 26 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: There are good teachers here.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is fully working and the labs have all the facilities. They are computerized and there are AC labs, and computers are the latest. Classrooms are clean and have digital boards and AC. The library has having huge capacity for students and has lots of books and good space for learning.

reviews.review_heading: Subject and scope of the study. Avoid using abbreviations. Positive behaviour.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi and labs are available. Facilities like digital smart classes, canteen, medical, sports, food, restaurant, cafe, etc., are very good. There is a central library. Internet facility is also available. Smart digital classes are available. Facilities are good and nice. Overall, the campus infrastructure is very nice, neat, and clean.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Greater Noida Institute of ManagementReviewed on 18 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: GNIM is the first choice for PGDM students.
reviews.review_text: All classrooms have AC, smart boards, and Wi-Fi facility. The library has all the books on management and magazines. The food quality in our hostel is very fine, and we get hygienic meals throughout the day. The medical first-aid services are provided on the hostel campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Greater Noida Institute of ManagementReviewed on 17 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Worth to take admission here.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is well-designed and amazing. The college offers the best facilities. The library is full of books and journals. The hostel provides 24*7 Wi-Fi and laundry services. The food offered is amazing. Overall, it is a great experience in terms of infrastructure.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Greater Noida Institute of ManagementReviewed on 17 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Best for ROI. I must recommend it.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very wide compared to other college campus. The hostel facility is average. The transport facility is good and timely. There are a total of 6 canteens, and their prices are very low.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Greater Noida Institute of ManagementReviewed on 17 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Great college experience.
reviews.review_text: All things were available, including Wi-Fi, library, playground, and labs, and the management department was good, with all good facilities. I was from PG, so I didn’t know about the mess or canteen. The medical service was good, and sports facilities were also good and very helpful for all.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good management and faculty members.

review_content.Placements: In our college, the internship plays a vital role in every engineering student because they can learn skills through the internship. This helps to get the job which is very helpful to the students by getting new points and new techniques. All the students can participate in an internship in their final year, but the students should participate well in the internship to get good score.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have a separate room for gym but there is no proper gym equipment, so I can say that there is no gym located in our college. The cafe is very pleasant to take coffee, tea, snacks, etc. The cafe, canteen, and library are closed at 5.00 PM every working day. As I am a day scholar, the timing of college is 8.40 AM to 5:00 PM. The classes are dirty sometimes. There will be no cleaning of classes at the end of the day. The fans are not in good condition in our class.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: My honest review of my college.

review_content.Placements: Students can acquire placements from semester 1 to 2. They offer very good placements in MNCs like Saint Gobain, Asian Paints, Berger Paints, Reliance, and Amar Raja. They offer a salary package starting from 3,60,000-7,00,000. Most companies like COCA-COLA, Reliance, and ITC in these MNCs offer internship opportunities if you are really good at your academics. Most of the projects you can expect are at MNCs, and a few in small startups.
review_content.Infrastructure: They also provide hostel facilities for both girls and boys separately, and they charge almost 50,000 per year for them. When it comes to infrastructure, it is not good in the hostel, and they are not hygienic, and the food quality is average. I think they need to improve this. I chose an MBA in Marketing because of the varied opportunities it has. The faculty is good and interactive. They help us a lot from the time of joining to the end of college. Some faculty also guide you after college.

review_summary.college_name: Gayatri Vidya Parishad College for Degree and PG Courses Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good college near each other.

content.Placements: In our college the internship plays a vital role in every engineering student because they can learn the skill by the internship, this helps to get the job which was very helpful to the students by getting new points and new technics, all the students can participate in internship in there final year, but the students should participate well in the internship to get good score.
content.Infrastructure: We have a separate room for the gym but there is no proper gym equipment, so I can say that there is no gym located in our college. The cafe is very pleasant to take coffee, tea, and snacks etc. The cafe, canteen, and library are closed. 5.00 pm every working day, as I am a day scholar, the timings of college are 8.40 AM to 5, the classes are dirty sometimes, there will be no cleaning of classes at the end of the day and the fans are not in good condition in our class.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Very nice and good faculty along with management.

content.Placements: In our college, the internship plays a vital role in every engineering student because they can learn the skills through the internship. This helps them get the job, which is very helpful to the students by gaining new insights and techniques. All the students can participate in internships in their final year, but the students should participate well in the internship to get a good score.
content.Infrastructure: We have a separate room for the gym, but there is no proper gym equipment, so I can say that there is no gym located in our college. The cafe is very pleasant to take coffee, tea, or snacks. The cafe, canteen, and library are closed at 5:00 PM every working day. As I am a day scholar, the timings of the college are 8:40 AM to 5:00 PM. The classes are dirty sometimes. There will be no cleaning of classes at the end of the day, and the fans are not in good condition in our class.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good management and faculty members.

content.Placements: In our college, the internship plays a vital role in every engineering student because they can learn skills through the internship. This helps to get the job which is very helpful to the students by getting new points and new techniques. All the students can participate in an internship in their final year, but the students should participate well in the internship to get good score.
content.Infrastructure: We have a separate room for gym but there is no proper gym equipment, so I can say that there is no gym located in our college. The cafe is very pleasant to take coffee, tea, snacks, etc. The cafe, canteen, and library are closed at 5.00 PM every working day. As I am a day scholar, the timing of college is 8.40 AM to 5:00 PM. The classes are dirty sometimes. There will be no cleaning of classes at the end of the day. The fans are not in good condition in our class.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My honest review of my college.

content.Placements: Students can acquire placements from semester 1 to 2. They offer very good placements in MNCs like Saint Gobain, Asian Paints, Berger Paints, Reliance, and Amar Raja. They offer a salary package starting from 3,60,000-7,00,000. Most companies like COCA-COLA, Reliance, and ITC in these MNCs offer internship opportunities if you are really good at your academics. Most of the projects you can expect are at MNCs, and a few in small startups.
content.Infrastructure: They also provide hostel facilities for both girls and boys separately, and they charge almost 50,000 per year for them. When it comes to infrastructure, it is not good in the hostel, and they are not hygienic, and the food quality is average. I think they need to improve this. I chose an MBA in Marketing because of the varied opportunities it has. The faculty is good and interactive. They help us a lot from the time of joining to the end of college. Some faculty also guide you after college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am lucky to get a seat in our college under a scholarship.

content.Placements: Every year nearly 120-180 members are allotted in every course from EAMCET counseling and management seats. The initial classes are divided into 2-3 sections. Each contains 60 members only. The highest package of our college is on average 6 LPA, and least is 2.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: I like the college premises. I love the infrastructure of our college. I like the atmosphere of the college. I am hesitant to walk on the road when there is heavy traffic. I don't like the maintenance of some labs, don't like the washrooms in some blocks. I don't like the roads when there is traffic.

reviews.review_heading: Good college near each other.
reviews.review_text: We have a separate room for the gym but there is no proper gym equipment, so I can say that there is no gym located in our college. The cafe is very pleasant to take coffee, tea, and snacks etc. The cafe, canteen, and library are closed. 5.00 pm every working day, as I am a day scholar, the timings of college are 8.40 AM to 5, the classes are dirty sometimes, there will be no cleaning of classes at the end of the day and the fans are not in good condition in our class.

reviews.review_heading: Very nice and good faculty along with management.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: They also provide hostel facilities for both girls and boys separately, and they charge almost 50,000 per year for them. When it comes to infrastructure, it is not good in the hostel, and they are not hygienic, and the food quality is average. I think they need to improve this. I chose an MBA in Marketing because of the varied opportunities it has. The faculty is good and interactive. They help us a lot from the time of joining to the end of college. Some faculty also guide you after college.

reviews.review_heading: I am lucky to get a seat in our college under a scholarship.
reviews.review_text: I like the college premises. I love the infrastructure of our college. I like the atmosphere of the college. I am hesitant to walk on the road when there is heavy traffic. I don't like the maintenance of some labs, don't like the washrooms in some blocks. I don't like the roads when there is traffic.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and best placements.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities are too good. The campus provided separate hostels for boys and girls. The bedrooms are good with an attached bathroom. The food is good. Infrastructure is good. The classrooms are good with comfortable benches. Labs are good. Library is also available. Wi-Fi facilities are also available. The medical facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: I am not a hosteler, I am a day scholar. Don't have single rooms, they provide shared rooms with 4-6 members. Outside of campus, we have PG accommodation, for hostel and for mess, we should pay yearly Rs 65,000/-. Food is good, especially South Indian food, which tastes awesome.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely disappointed.
reviews.review_text: Coming to the food, they serve sambar daily only, and no other food, no non-vegetarian food is served.

reviews.review_heading: I will recommend my for those students those who want to enjoy as well as study.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is good. We have AC classrooms and a central library and we also have Wi-Fi facility throughout the campus. College hostel is best for girls and not good for boys. Food in hostels are excellent. In our college we have gym, sports, NSS and NCC.

There are air conditioning labs in our department. The quality of food in our hostel is good, and sports facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: College is near each other.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are not bad, actually. Girls' and boys' hostels are separate. The girls' block maintained hygiene and had a separate mess, just like the boys' hostel, which was constructed with strict rules and management. Neither boys are allowed in the girls' hostel nor vice versa. Study rooms and beds were allotted to each student, with a maximum of three members per room. In the library, the internet speed is very excellent, which students use effectively for their studies. The girls' hostel is on c...

reviews.review_heading: Its a good place to build a career and a professional life.
reviews.review_text: College has a spacious campus with free Wi-Fi throughout, and the classrooms are equipped with digital boards. Labs are also equipped with a good number of all functional systems. Hostels are very good for the girls, and for the boys, its not recommended.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it's a good place to build a good career and a professional life.
reviews.review_text: College comes with a very spacious campus and is provided with Wi-Fi almost everywhere around the campus. The classrooms are also equipped with digital boards, mainly for the CSE students. The classrooms are also equipped with systems that are fully functional. The libraries are very good in the college, with books not only academic but also to learn management skills. Hostels for the girls are very secure here, and for the boys, the college hostel is not recommended. Besides the mates in the ho...

fees_and_eligibility.overview: DBS Global University offers a wide range of programmes to students at UG, PG, and PhD levels. The university offers courses to students in mode. At the UG level, the university offers various programmes to students such as BTech, BSc, BBA, BCom, BCA, BA, BMLT, etc. At the PG level, the university offers courses such as MBA, MTech, MCA, MSc, MA, and many more.

faqs.answer: A:    The DBS Global University MBA fees is charged on per semester basis. There are four semester in the duration of the MBA courses offered by DBS Global. Hence candidates are charged the entire fees for the MBA course in four instalments at DBS Global University. Visit the website of the institute to check the MBA fees for the current year.
faqs.question: Is the DBS Global University MBA fees charged on per annum or per semester basis?

faqs.answer: A:    The cost of MBA in DBS Global University depends on the specialisation taken by the student. MBA (Global) course is priced at approximately INR 16.4 Lacs and the MBA in Business Analytics with SAS and Global Tour cost around INR 8.6 Lacs and the MBA in Luxury and Fashion Management costs around INR 10.8 Lacs and MBA in International Business with Foreign Tour is priced at around INR 8 Lacs and MBA in Health Care and Pharmaceutical Management is priced at around INR 8 lakh.
faqs.question: What is the fee structure for MBA courses at DBS Global University?

The selection criteria is a mix of entrance exams and merit-based as per respective courses. To get admitted to DBS Globat University, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers PhD programme.
faqs.question: Can I get into DBS Global University without entrance exam?

review_content.General: The infrastructure of DBS Global University is impeccable, with free Wi-Fi available for the students, air-conditioned classrooms, a 2-storied library, labs with quality desktops, and a smart teaching board in each classroom. The girls' hostel has good and safe facilities, such as daily medical consultations, a separate building for sports and indoor games. The mess food is also hygienic and homely. The hostel also has free gym facilities, 24/7 Wi-Fi, water cooler on each floor, and an elevator.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I think this college is a read and utter for good students who are punctual.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 90% of students are placed in my college. The highest package is 24 LPA, average is 6.5 LPA, and the lowest is 4.5 LPA. Recruiting companies are Deloitte, Ultratech, Asian Paints, and so on. 100% of students got internships from my course in good companies like Patanjali, Deloitte, Ultratech, Wipro, and so on.
review_content.Infrastructure: In my college, Wi-Fi is placed in every class with a good speed. In every class, there are 2 big ACs that can fill the room in 39 minutes. Labs are very good for pharmacy students M.Tech. So many labs are there. Library is damn good. There are 2 libraries. Quality of food is good in mess. There are 3 canteens in my college, and every canteen is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Good return on investment college under budget friendly.

review_content.Placements: Around 80% of students get placed in the summer internship program. The average package is 3 LPA. TOI, Deloitte, M&M, etc., are some of the companies that visit.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel life, especially in the new boys' residence hostel, is pretty good. The food is also good, and the wardens are cooperative. Hostel life is full of entertainment. Quality time can be spent there. A badminton court and a table tennis court are also there. Food is unlimited.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful, as well as qualified and knowledgeable. Their teaching quality is premium. This course curriculum is relevant, but the thing is that due to the quarterly system, the exams are held on a frequent basis. The passing percentage is 50%.

faqs.answer: Candidates looking for course admission at DBS Global University must pass in house entrance exam called DBS University Entrance Exam for all course admission. However, for the PhD course, the university admits students based on PhD Entrance Test (PET) and an Interview or only interview. DBS Global University's admission process includes several steps. Students applying for the programmes offered at the college must ensure to satisfy the course-specific admission criteria as per the college's guidelines. The entire application process is in online mode.
faqs.question: Q: Can I get direct admission at DBS Global University?

faqs.answer: To get admission in any of the DBS Global University programmes, you need to check the eligibility first. Eligible students can then apply online. The DBS Global University selection process includes entrance test performance + academic merit + online interview. Selected students need to pay fees for seat confirmation.
faqs.question: Q: How to get admission in DBS Global University?

faqs.answer: DBS Global University admissions are open. So far, the university has not posted any last dates. Interested students can apply while the application window is open. For more details, students can go to the DBS Global University website.

overview_faqs.question: Why choose DBS Global University?
overview_faqs.answer: DBS Global University was established in 2007 and is located in Dehradun, Uttarakhand. It is one of the leading universities in Dehradun to offer quality education to students in fields such as Business Management, Law, Computer Applications, Pharmacy, etc. DBS Global University placement cell provides placement assistance to students and has top recruiters such as Zara, IDBI Bank, Axis Bank, Deloitte, EY, American Express, etc. The university has also collaborated with several international universities, including the Norwegian University of Science and Technology, Shinawatra University, Malaysia University of Science and Technology, and many others.

overview_faqs.question: Is the DBS Global University MBA fees charged on per annum or per semester basis?
overview_faqs.answer: The DBS Global University MBA fees is charged on per semester basis. There are four semester in the duration of the MBA courses offered by DBS Global. Hence candidates are charged the entire fees for the MBA course in four instalments at DBS Global University. Visit the website of the institute to check the MBA fees for the current year.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee structure for MBA courses at DBS Global University?
overview_faqs.answer: The cost of MBA in DBS Global University depends on the specialisation taken by the student. MBA (Global) course is priced at approximately INR 16.4 Lacs and the MBA in Business Analytics with SAS and Global Tour cost around INR 8.6 Lacs and the MBA in Luxury and Fashion Management costs around INR 10.8 Lacs and MBA in International Business with Foreign Tour is priced at around INR 8 Lacs and MBA in Health Care and Pharmaceutical Management is priced at around INR 8 lakh.

review_summary.college_name: DBS Global University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Integrated BBA+MBA - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: Really sounds like college and is worth joining.

content.Placements: The placement rate is good compared to other colleges, which have high fees and no placement. The highest package recently is around 24 LPA in MBA, and around 80 percent of the students got placed from the outgoing batch. The internships are provided by the college according to the course from time to time.
content.Infrastructure: The classroom is well designed for the convenience of the students, and the campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled, and there are 2 libraries for the students. The food provided is very good in comparison to any canteen or mess, and the hostel facilities provide for the sports and fitness of the students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Exceptional infrastructure and course.

content.Placements: The placement of DBS is quite good, as companies such as HAFFLE, DELOITTE, CK, among others, showed up. Mainly it focused on the marketing and HR sector. The entire week, the placement cell focused on the well-being, development, and recruitment of the students and made them prepared for the interview, where around 76 percent of students successfully received placement.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of DBS Global University is impeccable, with free Wi-Fi available for the students, air-conditioned classrooms, a 2-storied library, labs with quality desktops, and a smart teaching board in each classroom. The girls' hostel has good and safe facilities, such as daily medical consultations, a separate building for sports and indoor games. The mess food is also hygienic and homely. The hostel also has free gym facilities, 24/7 Wi-Fi, water cooler on each floor, and an elevator.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I think this college is a read and utter for good students who are punctual.

content.Placements: Approximately 90% of students are placed in my college. The highest package is 24 LPA, average is 6.5 LPA, and the lowest is 4.5 LPA. Recruiting companies are Deloitte, Ultratech, Asian Paints, and so on. 100% of students got internships from my course in good companies like Patanjali, Deloitte, Ultratech, Wipro, and so on.
content.Infrastructure: In my college, Wi-Fi is placed in every class with a good speed. In every class, there are 2 big ACs that can fill the room in 39 minutes. Labs are very good for pharmacy students M.Tech. So many labs are there. Library is damn good. There are 2 libraries. Quality of food is good in mess. There are 3 canteens in my college, and every canteen is good.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good return on investment college under budget friendly.

content.Placements: Around 80% of students get placed in the summer internship program. The average package is 3 LPA. TOI, Deloitte, M&M, etc., are some of the companies that visit.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel life, especially in the new boys' residence hostel, is pretty good. The food is also good, and the wardens are cooperative. Hostel life is full of entertainment. Quality time can be spent there. A badminton court and a table tennis court are also there. Food is unlimited.
content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful, as well as qualified and knowledgeable. Their teaching quality is premium. This course curriculum is relevant, but the thing is that due to the quarterly system, the exams are held on a frequent basis. The passing percentage is 50%.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: You will forget your home as it provides all the facilities needed and very good friends.

content.Placements: As I am an MBA student and my completion year is 2026. I am reviewing 2025 batch. Before that, I want to say that this year only it turned into a university so their admission seats are not limited. In my batch, 700 students are admitted. So last year, out of 300 students, almost all were placed, but the process is still going on. The highest is 24 LPA, the lowest may be 4 LPA, and average is 8 LPA. Recruiting companies are KPMG and Deloitte. All 700 students got their internships at companies like Uniliv, Times of India, Zara, etc. Role offered is sales job.

admission_overview.title: DBS Global University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: DBS Global University admission 2026 is open for various courses. The university offers UG, PG, Certificate, Diploma, courses in fields, such as Engineering, Management, Arts, etc. The selection criteria is a mix of entrance exams and merit-based depending on the courses. To get admitted to DBS Global University, candidates must meet the eligibility set by the university. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers a PhD programme. The application process at DBS Global University is conducted online. For entrance-based admissions, students are selected based on the DBS University Entrance Examination and online interview. However, national-level entrance exam scores, such as JEE/ CAT/ XAT/ CUET, etc are also accepted for some of the course admissions, such as BTech, MBA etc.

eligibility_selection.title: DBS Global University Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: DBS Global University course admissions are offered based on preset admission requirements. The seats are offered based on either academic merit in the last qualifying exam or entrance exams. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 whereas graduation is required to apply for PG programmes. The selection criteria varies based on the programme. Students need to submit scores of accepted entrance test or appear for the in-house entrance test. Those with valid scores in national-level exams, such as CAT/ XAT/ NMAT/ GMAT/ CUET/ JEE Mains are exempted from the DGU-AT/ DBS Global University Entrance Exam.

admission_process.title: DBS Global University Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: DBS Global University admission processcan be completed online mainly. To start the process, students need to go through the eligibility requirements. Eligible students can then register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at DBS Global University is as per the steps given below:
DBS Global University Application Process 2026

The application mode is online. For admission to the various programmes, aspirants need to apply at the official website, https://dgu.ac/. The application fee for PhD course is INR 1,200. Candidates should submit a Preliminary Research Idea: A document not exceeding 1,000 words, to be uploaded during application.
Selection Process 2026

DBS Global University selects students mainly through entrance test performance. The general selection process requires students to submit entrance test scores or appear for the university's entrance exam. Final selection is based on academic merit + entrance scores + online interview.

However, candidates who have Candidates who have cleared an All India National Level Competitive Examination in the relevant field, such as NET of UGC/CSIR/ICAR (ASRB), ICAR-AICE-JRF/SRF (PhD), GPAT, ICMR, GATE, or DST-INSPIRE within the last two years of the PhD session are exempted from the written test. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for the final selection.
Merit List & Admission Confirmation

The university also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for verification of documents and pay theDBS Global University feeto confirm their seats at the university.

faqs.question: Can I get admission at DBS Global University without an entrance exam?
faqs.answer: Most DBS Global University courses need an entrance test for admission. Yet, certain UG courses such as BPharma might consider merit-based selection. Entrance scores are needed for higher studies such as MBA and PhD. Students must check the admission requirements minutely before enrolling.

faqs.question: Is DBS Global University entrance exam hard?
faqs.answer: DBS Global University entrance exam difficulty varies with the course applied for. BTech and MBA entrance exams are of moderate level and assess subject-based fundamental knowledge. Well-prepared students in subjects and aptitude can clear the exam. Practice and exposure to the pattern of exams ease the test.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to various courses at DBS Global University?
faqs.answer: The university offers more than 15 courses in various streams such as Engineering, Business Management, Pharmacy, etc.The selection criteria for the course is based on entrance exam scores or merit-based as per respective courses. Students can check the table below to know course-wise eligibility and selection criteria:Course NameEligibilitySelection CriteriaBTech in CSE with MinorClass 12 with a 60% aggregate with Physics, Mathematics, Chemistry/Computer Science as mandatory subjectsNational Level Entrance Examination + Online Interview + DBS University Entrance Exam (Merit based on cumulative Score based on Class 10 Class 12 + Online Interview + Writing Test )MBAGraduation with a 50% aggregate or equivalentClass 10, Class 12 & graduation marks and online interview of the shortlisted candidates + CAT/ NMAT/ GMAT/ CMAT/ XAT/GRE or DBS Global University Entrance ExaminationMBA in Business Analytics and Digital TransformationGraduation with a 50% aggregate or equivalent/BTech/BCA/MCA/BSc

faqs.question: How can I apply for DBS Global University?
faqs.answer: DBS Global Universityapplication processis conducted online. Students looking for offline applications must visit the institute to collect the application form. The application fee for PhD course is INR 1,200. A step-by-step process for filling out the online application form is mentioned below:Step 1:Visit the official DBS Global University website (dgu.ac/) and click on the 'Apply Now' tab to register as a new user. In the registration form, provide details such as name, email ID, and password.Step 2:Verify the verification email sent to the registered email address.Step 3:Once verified, candidates will receive an email on the registered email with the user ID and password.Step 4:Log in to the admission portal and fill up the application form with all relevant details.Step 5:Pay the application fee online with a credit card/debit card or net banking and submit the form.
