hostel_campus.college_name: DBS Global University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

labs.description: Available Facilities: Computer Lab, Innovation labs, AI / ML Lab, Deep Learning Lab, Data Science & Analytics Hub, Advanced Robotics & AI Lab, FinTech & Financial Engineering Lab, Mac Lab, SAP Lab, SAS Lab, NVIDIA GPU Labs

reviews.batch: Batch of 2030Offered by Doon Business SchoolReviewed on 7 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Really sounds like college and is worth joining.
reviews.review_text: The classroom is well designed for the convenience of the students, and the campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled, and there are 2 libraries for the students. The food provided is very good in comparison to any canteen or mess, and the hostel facilities provide for the sports and fitness of the students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Doon Business SchoolReviewed on 9 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Exceptional infrastructure and course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of DBS Global University is impeccable, with free Wi-Fi available for the students, air-conditioned classrooms, a 2-storied library, labs with quality desktops, and a smart teaching board in each classroom. The girls' hostel has good and safe facilities, such as daily medical consultations, a separate building for sports and indoor games. The mess food is also hygienic and homely. The hostel also has free gym facilities, 24/7 Wi-Fi, water cooler on each floor, and an elevator.

reviews.review_heading: I think this college is a read and utter for good students who are punctual.
reviews.review_text: In my college, Wi-Fi is placed in every class with a good speed. In every class, there are 2 big ACs that can fill the room in 39 minutes. Labs are very good for pharmacy students M.Tech. So many labs are there. Library is damn good. There are 2 libraries. Quality of food is good in mess. There are 3 canteens in my college, and every canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: Good return on investment college under budget friendly.
reviews.review_text: Hostel life, especially in the new boys' residence hostel, is pretty good. The food is also good, and the wardens are cooperative. Hostel life is full of entertainment. Quality time can be spent there. A badminton court and a table tennis court are also there. Food is unlimited.

reviews.review_heading: You will forget your home as it provides all the facilities needed and very good friends.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available. Hostel is good with all facilities needed. Food is good but average festive food. If any visitors arrive at hostel, the food is fantastic. I miss my hostel. There are 2 canteens. Food is superb, open till 7:00 PM.

reviews.review_heading: Highly satisfied with the course curriculum and placement records. It has best college life.
reviews.review_text: It has well-furnished infrastructure and classrooms with high-end modern amenities. It also provides Wi-Fi, modern labs, and a fully organised library with good stuff and top-notch ambience. The quality is worth the penny. Hostel meals are also good and made with hygiene. Canteens are there with good food and variety. 24x7 medical facilities are available with a private doctor and counsellor. There are good sports facilities as well.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Doon Business SchoolReviewed on 3 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College review for (BBA).
reviews.review_text: Hostel is better than the campus. The campus is also pretty good, but it's just that it's not a huge campus. The campus is still well-maintained and hygienic. There are most of the facilities available in the college, but the hostel count is more than the college buildings.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Doon Business SchoolReviewed on 20 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This is a very good college for management and law courses especially with other courses.
reviews.review_text: AC classes are provided and classes of MBA are great. Same as movies. Wi-Fi is there in hostels. There are 3 girls' hostels within the campus and 2 boys' hostels in front of the college and near the college. Boys' hostels are too good as built newly. Doctors visit hostels each week.

reviews.review_heading: My college is good and has very good placement record.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available are extremely good including labs, classrooms, and library are also good. The surrounding buildings and infrastructure are also good enough that must be known to everyone so I believe I should be thankful to this college for providing such facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The placement opportunities are very good.
reviews.review_text: The facility of Wi-Fi, labs, and a library is very well. The food is available in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities, sports, and games are very good. In addition to that, I would also say that the food they are providing and the sports equipment are also very good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Doon Business SchoolReviewed on 19 Mar 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with my college as it provides practical exposure.
reviews.review_text: Facility and infrastructure of my college are extremely good. Classrooms are digital and have long whiteboards. Library facility is also very good. Students often study in groups at library. Food provided is also good medical insurance is also given by them of 1.5 Lakhs.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Doon Business SchoolReviewed on 14 Mar 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Placements at the university are good.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good. The total infrastructure of the college is nice. It has Wi-Fi, an Apple lab, an SAP lab, and a Science lab. It also has 2 canteen and food in the hostel is good. The hostel has a good Wi-Fi facility and a geyser in bathrooms. There is a gym and playing room in the hostel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Doon Business SchoolReviewed on 13 Mar 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely, facilities and infrastructure are good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and management of our hostel are very good. We receive four meals a day on time, and the food quality is also good. They maintain hygiene as well. We have a sports ground where we can play football, and there is a gym in the hostel. There are three libraries on campus where we can read and study. Overall, the infrastructure is good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Doon Business SchoolReviewed on 13 Mar 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college has average placements, good faculty members, and good hostel facilities.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is top-class, with every facility, and it is also beautiful. The college infrastructure is decent, but ongoing infrastructure and construction work is happening too. The college size is decent, and it has the necessary facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Doon Business SchoolReviewed on 13 Mar 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is amazing. The life at college is truly amazing.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good. Wi-Fi facility, induction, irons, and essentials are provided by the college. There are great facilities. Everyone is helpful and kind to each other. Hostels are furnished, and more hostels are being built within a few months. If we talk about classrooms and libraries, they are quite good and perfect for the environment.

faqs.answer: A:    The fees range for courses offerred by the IMA - International Maritime Academy is around INR 200000 - INR 700000.
faqs.question: What is the fees range for courses offerred by the IMA - International Maritime Academy?

reviews_list.review_title: Good college with full enjoyment.

review_content.Placements: According to me, it is one of the best college for maritime engineering when it comes to placement opportunities. Some top companies like shipping corporation of India etc use to come. Packages go till 17 Lacs per annum. Campus also give lots of internship opportunities.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is also very good. It provides all the facilities like Wi-Fi, well-maintained library, sports ground, medical facilities and many more. As the college is in Chennai, South Indian dishes are good but North Indian is tasteless. But overall infrastructure is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Marine Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2014
reviews_list.review_title: This institute is good for a middle-class person because they provide instalment education loan.

review_content.Placements: All the students in our academy get placements. The highest salary offered is Rs. 1 lacs per month. The average salary offered is Rs. 50,000 per month. The lowest salary offered is Rs. 30,000 per month. Top recruiting companies are Blue Whale, Sunshine and Indonesia International Trade Centre. Top roles offered in our courses are third-level officer, second-level officer and assistant captain. The highest salary package offered in our course is 13 LPA. The lowest salary package offered in our course is 3 LPA. All the students from our course got an internship at a local Indian company.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Marine Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, our college is good, but the only problem is our college does not provide any placements.

review_content.Placements: Our college doesn't offer any placement opportunities. You can find a job through an agent or a reference. You can also walk-in directly to the company and crack the interviews. If you don't have any sources or references, you have to pay 3 to 4 lakhs to the college or agents to join the ship. Job opportunities are not that good here.

review_summary.college_name: IMA - International Maritime Academy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Marine Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Food and hygiene are a bit of an issue.

content.Placements: Almost 70% of cadets got placements across the world. The highest salary package offered is 5LP, A and the lowest salary package offered is 3LPA. Cadets were recruited by sponsorship exams on behalf of the college. Roles are mostly offered to B.Sc. like NCC etc., and NCC cadets were bit ease in every matter and a parade contingent also formed for cadets who are willing to do a parade on republic day in marina beach on behalf of the college, and all things are taken care of by college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good modern workshops for all courses, good faculty members, and classrooms. The library is also there containing marine-related books and practice papers. Facilities like basketball ground, football ground we can in the evening, and good quality are not up to mark especially for north Indians canteen food is good for everyone and its cheap too. Sports like basketball, football, and volleyball were played every day.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Marine Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: There is no placement and infrastructure. They don't issue certificates, and management is fake.

content.Placements: There are no placements. Everything depends on students' struggle. They stand in front of shipping company offices and fake agents, and they have paid a huge fee, like 4 lacs to 6 lacs. There is no placement cell at all.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides stinking mattresses and pillows. Water is available only for 30 minutes in the morning and 30 minutes in the evening. There is no proper drinking water. Food is prepared unhygienically, and it doesn't have any taste. It is made up of low-quality vegetables and pulses. There is no Wi-Fi and medical facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Marine Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Good college with full enjoyment.

content.Placements: According to me, it is one of the best college for maritime engineering when it comes to placement opportunities. Some top companies like shipping corporation of India etc use to come. Packages go till 17 Lacs per annum. Campus also give lots of internship opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is also very good. It provides all the facilities like Wi-Fi, well-maintained library, sports ground, medical facilities and many more. As the college is in Chennai, South Indian dishes are good but North Indian is tasteless. But overall infrastructure is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Marine Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: This institute is good for a middle-class person because they provide instalment education loan.

content.Placements: All the students in our academy get placements. The highest salary offered is Rs. 1 lacs per month. The average salary offered is Rs. 50,000 per month. The lowest salary offered is Rs. 30,000 per month. Top recruiting companies are Blue Whale, Sunshine and Indonesia International Trade Centre. Top roles offered in our courses are third-level officer, second-level officer and assistant captain. The highest salary package offered in our course is 13 LPA. The lowest salary package offered in our course is 3 LPA. All the students from our course got an internship at a local Indian company.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Marine Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Overall, our college is good, but the only problem is our college does not provide any placements.

content.Placements: Our college doesn't offer any placement opportunities. You can find a job through an agent or a reference. You can also walk-in directly to the company and crack the interviews. If you don't have any sources or references, you have to pay 3 to 4 lakhs to the college or agents to join the ship. Job opportunities are not that good here.
content.Infrastructure: Our campus has everything according to DGS requirements. The infrastructure includes an on-campus ship, bridge room, engine room simulator lab, swimming pool, mechanical lab, electrical lab, GP marine maintenance shop, seamanship lab, hostel building, DNS marine maintenance shop, etc.

reviews.review_text: Facilities provided by our institute are average compared to other institutes in Chennai. The infrastructure provided is awesome, but Wi-Fi is not available for 24x7, and it is only available during working hours. Classrooms are good. The quality of the food served in the mess is good, but non-vegetarian food is not allowed. The medical facility is available 24x7. In sports, there are many indoor and outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, our college is good, but the only problem is our college does not provide any placements.

The infrastructure includes an on-campus ship, bridge room, engine room simulator lab, swimming pool, mechanical lab, electrical lab, GP marine maintenance shop, seamanship lab, hostel building, DNS marine maintenance shop, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are good, but the placements are poor.
reviews.review_text: There are four buildings in the name of infrastructure. One of the buildings is allotted for the hostel. Rest other buildings are allotted for academic purpose, and even some floors are allotted for hostel facility. You have to suffer for water, food, and electricity facilities because all these facilities are very poor. There is no Wi-Fi facility. Classrooms are under CCTV surveillance. There are a library and canteen in a building.

reviews.review_heading: Merchant Navy life style.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure on the campus is good. All the workshop equipment is available to perform all the experiments. In our campus, there is a ship which has a 4 stroke diesel engine and various auxiliary machines in a beautiful building. All the buildings on the campus are white. There is also a canteen on the campus. There is a mess in our college, but it provides average food 3-times a day, and they also provide food including evening snacks. There is one hostel building with eight floors. Stude...

reviews.review_heading: Overall, this type of institutions should be properly inspected on a regular basis.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is average. Hostel facilities are good. The quality of the food in the mess is good. Shipping campus looks good, but they won't provide practical knowledge for the students in shipping campus as it should be improved. Seamanship lab is also not that standard.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of fake promises of placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. But there is no Wi-Fi and canteen facility. A swimming pool is available, and classrooms are in good condition. Hostel facility is also good, and the mess is big and good, but the food is average. The hostel rooms have a capacity to accommodate 4 people per room with separate cupboards. There are long corridors in the 6 floor building.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is great in the college except placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is great. The infrastructure is of high quality. The college provides great field, hostel, ships structure, great workshops, and the academy. Everything is perfect. The college has a football ground and two basketball courts. I will rate the infrastructure with 5/5. The college has the best infrastructure when compared with the other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: A review on International Maritime Academy.
reviews.review_text: International Maritime Academy has good infrastructure. It has its own multi-storey building. There is a special marine block for the course. There is a separate building known as marine hostel block for hostel facility. A special block is allocated for the library.

reviews.review_heading: International maritime academy.
reviews.review_text:
This college has good infrastructure seperate college building. Seperate library building. Seperate hostel for residential courses. This college provides only residential courses. Huge playground. Ship in campus also there
All marine related workshop is there.

reviews.review_heading: Good infra, bad placement.
reviews.review_text: You will give 8 out of 10. There is Wi-Fi in the college for all the students. Labs are well maintained. The library is okay. There are very few books. If you are talking about the medical facility, there is no help from the college side. Sports and games are outstanding. Cricket ground, football ground basketball court, etc. are all there.

reviews.review_heading: A college where you can get Indian CDC.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, but in the hostel, the lifts don't work, but the hostel is kept clean and tidy. The hostel is of 8 floors in which all students stay leaving the first year as they have a separate hostel but mess facility for every year is in one place only, but the timings are different, and the hostel is boys hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a nice college.
reviews.review_text: There is nice infrastructure with a library, hostel, swimming pool, basketball, volleyball court, gym etc. And I have the best moments in the college.

Candidates must know their MATS University eligibility criteria and apply accordingly. At the UG level, the university offers a three-year regular , three-year regular , and various other courses to students. At the PG level, the university offers two-year regular MCom, , MSc, and various other courses to students. The university also provides diploma and other courses to students. faqs.answer: A:    MATS University offers admission based on merit and valid entrance exam scores. Therefore, candidates must secure the minimum aggregate in Class 12 to seek admission at UG level courses. Whereas, for PG level courses, candidates must secure valid scores in graduation.Moreover, candidates must secure valid scores in accepted entrance exams such as JEE Main, LSAT, CAT, XAT, MAT, GATE and others. Candidates are shortlisted for the counselling process and after all the selection rounds, final merit list is drawn. Final admission is offered once the shortlisted candidates pay the fees for seat confirmation.

review_summary.college_name: MATS University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Zoology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I don't think this college is good for people.

content.Placements: The percentage of students getting placed is very low. They usually get placement in private companies, but the college's role in bringing those placements is very low. People usually do this course and get placed. In college, I have seen people from other batches getting jobs with the exception. The average package in my course is that students got jobs in private schools, with a salary of Rs. 15,000 to Rs. 20,000. I hardly know anything about the companies. Nobody got a company placement from the college, and nobody got an internship.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is for name sake, it is for attracting students who are not willing to study but are just coming to have a degree in their name. My friend was thrown out of the hostel. The next exam was over without notifying the students beforehand.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Bad infrastructure, micro management, and poor facilities.

content.Placements: The placements are non-existent and mostly are to NGOs, giving like 2LPA offers max. This college is a no-go for placements. 10% of my seniors have been placed, and it was miserable. Most of them didn't even care to join, but we were made to sit in placements as they made it mandatory.
content.Infrastructure: I don't live in the hostel as I am a day scholar, but I have heard from my classmates and seniors that they have big hall dorms where they have laid out like 15 bedsheets and you have to sleep like that, no personal rooms or such, and even have to share your bathroom. Just don't choose it.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Chemistry, Botany, Zoology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Amazing college life and campus.

content.Placements: Placements are good and reputed companies come for placement interviews. About 75% of the students grab a remarkable package and many of them get satisfying internship opportunities. Even after internships, college provides you with counseling for further career planning. Not sure about the highest but the lowest package is around 5-6 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and facilities are top class. We have a huge campus with each and every kind of facility available. There are separate buildings for each department. Practical laboratories are well built and equipped with all the necessary facilities. Hostels are clean and hygienic. The mess is huge.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Management (BBA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: College has a very good faculty.

content.Placements: In MATS university approximately 70-80% students gets campus placements every year. From the 4th semester students starts getting internships and placements opportunities. The average package is 2-3lpa for the BBA students. Around 80% students gets internships through college.
content.Infrastructure: MATS University has a well developed infrastructure. There are sports and medical facilities available in the college. College has a canteen with the all types of fast foods available. College has Wi-Fi which can be accessed by the students. College has no hostel facility available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good placements.

content.Placements: Many top companies visit our college to recruit students. Almost 90% of students got placed in our college. Top recruiting companies are MRF, Ceat, TCS, etc. They offer good salary packages.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is excellent. Our college has a library. It provides issued books. We have a canteen. All classrooms are equipped with air-conditioners. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are good, helpful, and well-qualified. They help us in making projects for placements. They are always available for students to clear their doubts. Exams are conducted in a very disciplined manner.

admission_overview.title: MATS University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Those students who want to gain admission at Mahaveer Academy of Technology and Sciences (MATS) need to register themselves on the official site and complete the application form. Students get shortlisted for admission based on their performance in the accepting exams, like JEE Main or CUET-PG. Refer to the information below to know the admission process:

admission_process.title: MATS University Raipur Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Mahaveer Academy of Technology and Science University (MATS University) offers 40 undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral courses across 12 different schools in the disciplines of Engineering & Technology, Management, Law, Fashion Design, Arts, Education, Sciences, Business Studies, Library Science & Physical Education.MATS Universityis approved by the University Grants Commission (UGC) and the All India Council of Technical Education (AICTE). The mode of application for all courses is online, and admission is bothmerit-basedandentrance exam-based. Apart from regular degree courses, the university also extends UG, PG, certificate, and diploma courses through distance education.Check details here.

MATS University Raipur offers merit-based admission to various UG, PG, and doctoral courses; however, the university also accepts the scores of several entrance exams for courses like BTech, MBA, MTech, and MCA. Listed in the table below are MATS University courses along with entrance exams accepted for respective admissions at the university:

For MATS University admissions to various UG & PG courses, candidates have to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria, followed by the other selection rounds. Find below the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria related to MATS University course admissions 2025:

MATS University admissions 2025 provide both merit and entrance-based criteria.Applicants have to navigate their way through all stages of the selection procedure to be admitted.The following is an outline of the 2025 MATS University admission process:
Step 1: MATS University Application Process 2025

The MATS University admission process 2025 starts with the application stage.Application forms can be obtained from the university's website. The form may be mailed by post or handed over to the concerned department at MATS University. Payment for the application and entrance test can be made through an online process and candidates have to attach two photocopies of online bank challan with the pay slip to the application form.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

The UG, PG, and doctoral admissions are based on merit and an entrance exam.For BTech, scores from the entrance test JEE Main are used, while for MBA admission, scores from CAT, XAT, MAT, or any other similar management test are required. For MTech, a GATE score is required while in case of LL.M, a recognised law entrance exam or LSAT has to be cleared.B.Ed requires clearance of the university's entrance test by the candidate.
Step 3: Merit List Release & Counselling

After completing the selection process, candidates need to participate in counselling for the particular course for which they are shortlisted. The merit list will be released in multiple rounds by MATS University. The shortlisted candidates will have to pay the admission fee within the provided time period in order to secure their seats.

faqs.question: What is the overall CAT percentile cutoff for MBA admission at MATS University?

The cut-off represents the institution's uniform eligibility standard for its MBA course to ensure that the applicants demonstrate a comparable level of aptitude in the Common Admission Test (CAT) to gain admission.

The library is full of informative and useful books, and all the related books are available at the library. The hostel is very good. The food offered at the hostel is tasty and healthy.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good infrastructure and great faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available on the campus. There are hostels with separate wings for girls and boys. The quality of the mess is also good. There are good classrooms equipped with projectors. The library has all the books that will help us in our studies. The college has renovated hostels, medical support systems with a physiotherapy center, a modern gymnasium, a swimming pool, and a huge parking facility. Computer labs, a media lab, and a resource center comprise the physical IT infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of the classrooms, knowledgeable faculty members and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The campus is small, but it has a lot of facilities which are good like free Wi-Fi, a library, neat classrooms and labs. I am a day scholar, so I have no idea how does the food at the hostel taste. There is no mess or canteen in our college. Sports facilities are good here.

reviews.review_heading: Review of MATS University.
reviews.review_text: Talking about the infrastructure, MATS Unversity was not big but we had a lot of fun there. The campus was good. The hostel was quite good during our course duration. But the food served was worse.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of the best faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides all the facilities which we need. Classrooms are adequate, and smart classrooms are also available here. Almost all the books are available in the library. Labs are well-defined, and lab attendants were available to help us in every step of our practicals. I didn't face any infrastructure related issues at the college.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with out well qualified faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are provided with AC. Digital classroom is also available. We can get so many useful books from the library regarding our courses. Wi-Fi is also available in our college. We could go for online studies also in the college. Sports is the most important part of our college.

data.description: MATS University has experienced faculty members. MATS University faculty are diploma, PhD, and degree holders. MATS University faculty have years of experience and are industry experts. MATS University faculty motivates students to work on their knowledge and skills.

paragraphs: MATS University offers scholarships to deserving students to support their education. Students who wish to enroll in any course at MATS University will have to score a good percentage as a part of the selection process. Apart from this, students should also meet other criteria that the MATS University has chosen to avail the scholarship.
MATS University will concession fees based on marks scored in the qualifying exams.

MATS University offers Chancellors Scholarships to students which are purely based on the student's performance in the qualifying exam exams. A student who has scored brilliantly in Class 12 or Graduation can take advantage of this scholarship program. The scholarships are provided for first-year students only. 30% of total fee of the year

review_summary.college_name: Baba Farid Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Placement is decent here. So, it could be improved.

content.Placements: In the session of 2024-25, there are 75% students got placements in CSE in startup and non-technical companies. The highest package in this session 2025 was 12 LPA, and the lowest package was 3 LPA. If we come to average, it is around 4.5 LPA. 60% of students got internship opportunity offered by startup companies. Roles offered are system analyst, full-stack developer, and senior testing engineer.
content.Infrastructure: College building and its infrastructure are designed in the style of old palace which looks very authentic. Lawn is very good. Hostels are available both in AC and non-AC for students. Campus has fully Wi-Fi covered facility. Food and mess are very good. There is also a dispensary for students to give them first aid and immediate response to curve students. There are hockey court, a huge cricket ground, basketball court, volleyball court, kabaddi court, and badminton court. Indoor stadium is also available. Labs are well-equipped with modern computers, machines, and tools.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with campus and facilities.

content.Placements: In our area, like the Malwa region, I think it is the best college for study placements and many events. Packages offered to students are much higher, and famous companies like Google, Microsoft, etc. Many students get internships during their studies, and if someone has any skills apart from their studies, then the college also tries to give them placement.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and hostels are well-structured with AC and all other essential facilities. Transport facilities are offered at cheap fares. 4-5 canteens are in college, maintaining hygiene. Sports events are conducted every year. Medical facilities with first aid kits, etc., are available. Labs and Wi-Fi facilities are available in the entire college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Really all is good and well.

content.Placements: Placements are not very good but average placements are there. They guide well and training opportunities are there. Placements start with small salary but after 2-3 years of experience, this will provide good salary package in companies like MNCs or others so all are good.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of hostel is good. Course is very good and guides us very well. Hostel is fully AC, and all campus is fully AC. Hostel food is good. Labs are fully AC, and classrooms are also fully AC. Library is fully AC. Sports and games are also there like cricket and many more.

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Graphics and Web Designing - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Very good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Almost 90% of students got placed in our college. The highest package is 36 LPA, and average package is 10 LPA. Many companies like Amazon, Deloitte, Infosys, and Wipro are top recruiting companies. 80-90% of students get placed from this course in many companies like Wipro and TCS. Top roles offered are junior software, and there are many non-IT roles.
content.Infrastructure: This college provides all the necessary requirements like Wi-Fi and air-conditioning. Classrooms are also air-conditioned. Many facilities like labs and medical are also available. The canteen food is very tasty and fresh. There are many co-curricular activities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college is really good place for graduation.

content.Placements: The placement opportunities are quite good. Approximately 8 students are placed at a quite good package. The highest offered package was 72 LPA by Amazon and the lowest was about 7 LPA. Companies like Wipro, Infosys, and Edgate visit our college. The top role offered here is assistant professor.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and building infrastructure are commendable. The classrooms and buildings are very well maintained, and the college campus offers 24/7 Wi-Fi access. The laboratories are well-kept, and there is a centrally air-conditioned library. The hostel provides essential amenities, including 24/7 Wi-Fi, air-conditioned rooms, and round-the-clock access to the library. The food quality is above average, and medical facilities are available 24/7.

admission_process.title: Baba Farid Group of Institutions Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Currently,Baba Farid Group of Institutions admissions 2025are open for various courses. BFGI offers various courses such as BTech, BSc, BBA, BCA, MTech, MBA, MSc, MA etc. Under Baba Farid Group of Institutions, the institutions have four constituent colleges which areBaba Farid College of Engineering and Technology,Baba Farid College of Management and Technology,Baba Farid CollegeandBaba Farid College of Education.

Apart from this,BFGIoffers more than 25 full-time courses in various streams such as Engineering, Science, Commerce etc. The institutions also offer other courses likePGDCA, PG Diploma in Digital Marketing and Diploma in Advertising & PR. Baba Farid Group of Institutions also offers direct admissions to all the programmes excluding MTech CSE and BEd courses. BFGI admission process is a mix of entrance and merit-based. However, the institution is affiliated withPunjabi University, Patiala. The application process at BFGI is an online procedure. Read the following article to know more aboutBaba Farid Group of Institutionscourse admission2025.

BFSI admissions to all the courses is a mix of direct admission and entrance-based. Along with that, candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. The college also offers BTech Lateral Entry courses. For direct second-year admission through the Lateral Entry scheme, candidates need to complete a three-yearEngineeringdiploma in any stream. Check below the course-wise eligibility & selection criteria forBaba Farid Group of Institutions course admission2025:
Check OtherBaba Farid Group of Institutions other courses
BFGI admission process includes registration and selection criteria are merit-based. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat in Baba Farid Group of Institutions:
STEP 1: Baba Farid Group of Institutions Application Process 2025
Candidates are required to apply online by paying an application fee of INR 500 on the official website of the institute. The selection criteria for the course is direct admission.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

Students must meet course-wise eligibility and selection criteria for the course is direct admission. However, national-level entrance exam score, i.e., GATE is the preference selection criteria for MTech course.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. To allot and confirm the seat candidates are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.

placement_data.title: Baba Farid Group of Institutions Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: Baba Farid Group of Institutions has released the combined placement statistics for all the affiliated colleges. A total of 225 students registered for the 2023-24 placement process, out of which 170 were successfully placed . Further, 105 recruiters visited the campus and offered 183 job opportunities . The highest package offered during Baba Farid College placements 2024 stood at INR 12 LPA and the average package stood at INR 5.40 LPA . Infosys, Wipro, Deloitte, and many other renowned companies participated in 2024 placements.

hostel_campus.college_name: Baba Farid Group of Institutions Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Placement is decent here. So, it could be improved.
reviews.review_text: College building and its infrastructure are designed in the style of old palace which looks very authentic. Lawn is very good. Hostels are available both in AC and non-AC for students. Campus has fully Wi-Fi covered facility. Food and mess are very good. There is also a dispensary for students to give them first aid and immediate response to curve students. There are hockey court, a huge cricket ground, basketball court, volleyball court, kabaddi court, and badminton court. Indoor stadium is als...

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with campus and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and hostels are well-structured with AC and all other essential facilities. Transport facilities are offered at cheap fares. 4-5 canteens are in college, maintaining hygiene. Sports events are conducted every year. Medical facilities with first aid kits, etc., are available. Labs and Wi-Fi facilities are available in the entire college.

reviews.review_heading: Really all is good and well.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of hostel is good. Course is very good and guides us very well. Hostel is fully AC, and all campus is fully AC. Hostel food is good. Labs are fully AC, and classrooms are also fully AC. Library is fully AC. Sports and games are also there like cricket and many more.

reviews.review_heading: Very good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: This college provides all the necessary requirements like Wi-Fi and air-conditioning. Classrooms are also air-conditioned. Many facilities like labs and medical are also available. The canteen food is very tasty and fresh. There are many co-curricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: The college is really good place for graduation.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and building infrastructure are commendable. The classrooms and buildings are very well maintained, and the college campus offers 24/7 Wi-Fi access. The laboratories are well-kept, and there is a centrally air-conditioned library. The hostel provides essential amenities, including 24/7 Wi-Fi, air-conditioned rooms, and round-the-clock access to the library. The food quality is above average, and medical facilities are available 24/7.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with features.
reviews.review_text: It is a good college. Everything is good. The hostel is not good because students face some problems like some students eating mess food, which is not that good. It is good but we can't compare with it home food. There is a gym for students which is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a decent college with good faculty members and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: It has a good hostel with students who are very cooperative. There is Wi-Fi on the campus. Most Classes do not have air conditioning services but the administration block has AC. Although, the college has a big campus. It has a large campus and the college is very famous. The food in the hostel is average and decent. Infrastructure is good and it is in Bathinda which has cultural importance.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the college is amazing and everyone should visit the college at least one time.
reviews.review_text: The college provides various libraries, each dedicated to different subjects, and fully air-conditioned classrooms. Two libraries on campus are open day and night, and the entire campus is equipped with Wi-Fi. All facilities include a water cooler and a proper mess hall, complete with a diverse menu offering good quality food, as well as an ambulance for medical emergencies. Additionally, there are air-conditioned rooms furnished with benches and cabinets, and sports tournaments are organized on...

reviews.review_heading: The college has wonderful placement opportunities and a friendly environment.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college as well as the hostel is wonderful. The college and its environment are very neat, clean, and ragging-free. Hostels are also very neat and clean with excellent food facilities. They may also provide air conditioning facilities for hostelers.

reviews.review_heading: Honest Review of my college .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is pretty good, with the campus buildings being nice and the natural beauty of the college campus. The facilities like AC and libraries are available, but the Wi-Fi range and speed are limited for the students. Medical facilities are awful in this college, and sports are encouraged by the facilities.

reviews.review_heading: My college experience at Baba Farid College, Bathinda.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure with well-furnished classrooms along with many other facilities like Wi-Fi. The department has a big library with different knowledgeable books. The college hostel also has good infrastructure with good quality food and other facilities.

reviews.review_heading: AVERAGE PLACEMENT AND GOOD INFRASTRUCTURE. HIGHEST PACKAGE AVAILED 20 LPA.
reviews.review_text:
Fully Wi-Fi Campus with Seamless 5G Internet Connectivity.Modern Labs with modern tools And Fully AC Classrooms with Projector Also. Here Is An Innovation Lab For Ai & Machine Learning Researchers. Here is A library with the capacity of 67000k Books (Novel & Autobiography, Daily Newspaper -English, Hindi & Punjabi. Library is open 24 ?7 For Students. 

Hostel Is Very Good and Beautiful With All facilities. Here are AC and NON -AC Rooms. Food Quality Is far better than other state Colleges like U...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Baba Farid Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of BFGI is very excellent and the hostel and classrooms are fully air-conditioned. The mess provides the best hygienic food. All types of medical facilities are available. Every day, new sports events are ongoing on BFGI. Hostel life is also the best. The rooms are spacious, with the best bed and an almirah. Wi-Fi is also available on the whole campus and hostel.

reviews.review_heading: The main aim of writing is to give you an honest review of the college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided in the campus are very awesome including a clean hostel and mess. Students get two types of rooms being AC and Non-AC rooms. A high speed Wi-Fi facility is also provided in the campus. Many other facilities are provided by the college including a Bank, an ATM, AC library, Students help care center, etc. All these facilities are provided at pocket-friendly rates.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and good teachers but very poor placements.
reviews.review_text: About infrastructure I can say it is awesome. All the facilities are available like Wi-Fi, libraries etc. Full care is taken of greenery in the college. Classrooms are very good and equipped with projectors and in all classes two ACs are also installed. So it is awesome.

content.Placements: 90 percent of the students are placed from our course. The highest salary is 8 LPA per annum, and the lowest is 3 LPA per annum. reviews.review_text: A lot of facilities were available in this institute. We had a high voltage lab, microprocessor lab, machine lab, etc. Classrooms were also good and huge. The library was also available for students with all types of books like competitive exams.

reviews.review_text: SVPM is an educational campus and located in Malegaon Bk. It is sponsored by the Malegaon Sahakari Sakhar Karkhana Ltd, which is located in Shivnagar, Tal, Baramati district, Pune. So, it has a good infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is so beautiful and excellent. The college has separate departments for each course. The hostel rooms are well constructed. There is the biggest playground. Even the college provides gymkhana to students. There are various trees on campus which makes the infrastructure so beautiful.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is an amazing place to learn new technologies.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the hostel is good at the hostel. There is one hostel for boys have and two hostels for girls. Both provide 24 hours hot water and cold water facility. Hostels are Wi-Fi enabled. There is a separate mess for both hostels. They served lunch and dinner with good quality of food. The canteen area was very big to sit and chill in your free time with your friends. Each department had a separate floor and classrooms were big with comfortable sitting. The library was very good wit...

reviews.review_heading: It is the oldest college with the lowest fee structure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good and nature-friendly. Facilities like a hostel, stationary, etc., are very good and provided at the lowest fees. A library is available. You can take advantage of the library. Labs are equipped with many instruments required for students to gain essential knowledge.

reviews.review_heading: SVPM college is good for studying.
reviews.review_text: The college is located in a rural area, so its infrastructure is good as compared to the other colleges in the rural area. SVPM college building has two wings namely A Wing and B Wing. A Wing consists IT, computer, civil and FE departments while B Wing consists of mechanical, electronics, E&TC departments. Both the buildings have two floors.

reviews.review_heading: Please don't join this college. It is accredited with B grade by NAAC.

All the labs are available in the electrical department, but they are not much spacious, which is not comfortable for the students during practicals. Sports ground is huge.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements good faculty average infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: It's my biggest mistake joining here, you please don't do it. But, the fee is only 30k per year.

In these 4 years, I haven't seen any medical facilities in the college except for one week when NAC team visited the campus. The college does not provide money for students who participate ...

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges for civil.
reviews.review_text: The campus is good. There are lots of trees on the campus. One big playground and basketball court available. A big auditorium hall has constructed recently. All the buildings are clean. There is a silent environment for teaching. The college campus is well-planned with good architecture. The construction was good.

faqs.question: Are there any specializations offered by Sahyadri Valley College of Engineering and Technology?

faqs.answer:
A:    Sahyadri Valley College of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed Diploma Course in Engineering and Technology in relevant stream with minimum 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) from an All India Council for Technical Education or Central or State Government approved Institution or its equivalent.
OR
Candidate must have completed B.Sc. from UGC/ Association of Indian Universities recognised University with at least 45% marks (40% in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) and passed 10+2 with Mathematics as a subject.UG DiplomaCandidate passed 10th class/SSC examination or its equivalent, with at least 35% aggregate marks from any recognised institute/board are eligible to apply.After 10th DiplomaCandidate passed 10th class/SSC examination or its equivalent, with at least 35% aggregate marks from any recognised institute/board are eligible to apply.M.E./M.TechSponsored candidate must have minimum of two years of full time work experience in a registered firm/ company/ industry/ educational and/ or research institute/ any Government Department or Government Autonomous Organization in the relevant field in which admission is being sought.

The mechanical engineering students this year got maximum jobs through our campus. The companies like Infosys, IBM, etc., visited the campus. Other department students also get placement. I watched that many students of computer department get the internship in their field, but the internship is about your education level. In placement, I'll rate as 6/10.
review_content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi is not available on the campus, but they are available in the hostel. The labs are also good. The sports and medical facilities are really good. Talking about food in the canteen, it is also very good. Almost everything is good form my point of view. 6/10 marks I would give to my college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: Review

review_content.Other: The college has separate hostel facilities for both boys and girls. The training and placement of the college are not well defined as no core companies come for placement. The only jobs offered are that of a call center.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: An average college for students.

review_content.Placements: The college will not provide companies for jobs to students. Students must find them on their own. The positive reviews written by students are not good. At our college, only 30% of students get placements through campus. The lowest package is 2 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college campus is not the best for students .Free Wi-Fi facility is available on the campus and hostel, but you need to register first on the registration network. It also has a well-equipped computer lab, PCS and not many instruments. There is a canteen that provides good food to students and staff.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Sahyadri Valley College of Engineering and Technology for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
Sahyadri Valley College of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed Diploma Course in Engineering and Technology in relevant stream with minimum 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) from an All India Council for Technical Education or Central or State Government approved Institution or its equivalent.
OR
Candidate must have completed B.Sc. from UGC/ Association of Indian Universities recognised University with at least 45% marks (40% in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) and passed 10+2 with Mathematics as a subject.UG DiplomaCandidate passed 10th class/SSC examination or its equivalent, with at least 35% aggregate marks from any recognised institute/board are eligible to apply.After 10th DiplomaCandi

reviews_list.review_title: One of the best college for academics and placements with good campus life.

review_content.Placements: Very good placements in this college. Good core companies come to our college. Almost every student in our college is getting placed. The placement percentage is around 70 percent for all the branches, but majorly CSE students get more placements, such as Impetus, Infosys, and Visista.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classroom infrastructure is very good with Wi-Fi facilities, digital boards, and projectors. We also have separate libraries for separate departments and a central library with Wi-Fi and AC facilities. Hostels are okay with average food quality. We also have a dispensary on our campus for medical purposes.

reviews_list.review_title: Good placement and satisfied with the teaching and infrastructure of the college.

review_content.Placements: 60-70% of students get placed. The remaining students are preparing for GATE and other PSUs. Better placements with good repetition companies and good packages. 8 LPA is the best package, and 4 LPA is the least package. Good guidance is provided in placement training and other activities.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostels are old, but the new hostel construction is going on. Already, they have constructed a new hostel for 1st years, and a 4th year hostel was built in 2019. For the remaining, a new hostel is being constructed. Departments have good infrastructure, and they are developing labs up to date.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Over the past year, the university, which is no longer. Old College has brought many opportunities,

content.Placements: Actually, students who secured a rank in EAPCET from 2000 to 4000 will be placed in CSE. The highest package offered is 67 LPA from Google, and the average packages are around 4.5 to 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Google, Amazon, TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, followed by many reputed companies. Roles offered are software roles, data and AI roles, cybersecurity, Cloud and DevOps.
content.Infrastructure: The CSE department alone has 3 labs along with the research lab with Wi-Fi provided, and they are accessible during working hours. Classrooms consist of projectors and smartboards. The hostels are pretty clean and provide a homely nature, whereas the food is decent too, with veg and also non veg. There is a medical dispensary within the college. The JNTUK stadium is available all the time with a track in the center and volleyball, kho-kho, and box cricket courts. Within the stadium, you will have access to badminton and yoga halls.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college is good.

content.Placements: Placements are not very good, for 50 members, nearly 10 are placed. This college is not very good for placements, but for GATE, it is good. The highest package is 8 LPA to 9 LPA, and the average is 6 LPA in this college.
content.Infrastructure: Our department is very good to see, and our faculty is also very experienced. In the Andhra Pradesh state, our Jayanti Kakinada faculty is the most expensive faculty. That will teach teachers from their experience, and teaching is well in this college, but not short and narrow, but it is well.

admission_overview.college_name: University College of Engineering, Kakinada Admission 2026: Fees, Eligibility, Selection Process & Dates

admission_overview.title: University College of Engineering Kakinada Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: University College of Engineering, Kakinada, part of Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Kakinada, is recognised as a premier institution with accreditations from Wipro, Capgemini, and Infosys. It offers BTech, MTech, MCA, and PhD programmes across a range of domains that include Civil, EEE, Mechanical, ECE, CSE, Petrochemical, and Petroleum Engineering. Admissions are entrance based with the university accepting scores of national and state-level entrance exams like EAMCET, ECET, GATE, PGECET, and ICET. The duration of UG courses is four years while duration of PG courses at University College of Engineering, Kakinada, part of Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Kakinada is two years. PhD programmes extend upto three years with further extensions made possible as per requirement. Interested students may apply through the JEE Main registration process, with certain guidelines differing depending upon the preferred programme.

admission_process.title: University College of Engineering Kakinada Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: JNTUCEKadmission process starts with the application process. Ensure that the minimum eligibility for the preferred programme is met before applying for admission to the same. Find below the step-wise explanation of the JNTUCEK Admission process:
lists: Application Process:The University College of Engineering, Kakinada starts the admissions by submitting an online application. Applicants apply on the Andhra Pradesh State Council of Higher Education portal. The completed application form with all the necessary documents and proof of payment should be submitted online.

Eligibility Criteria:The candidates can qualify for the undergraduate BTech program by having at least 45% in Class 12 with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects. For PG programs of MTech and MCA, graduation degree with at least 50% marks is required. Each particular course requires a specific entrance exam, like AP EAMCET for BTech, GATE or AP PGECET for MTech, and APICET for MCA.

Selection Rounds:BTech applicants should pass the AP EAMCET exam. Candidates who wish to pursue MTech course have to clear either GATE or AP PGECET. MCA admissions depend on marks of APICET only. Candidates who clear the entrance exam move to the last step in the admission process.

Merit List Released and Counselling:JNTUCEK releases the merit lists round wise. Candidates whose names are appearing on the merit list are called for counseling procedure. In this final round, candidates need to bring original documents for the verification process and the pay the required fee to secure their admission.

faqs.question: What is the latest cutoff information for M.Tech at University College of Engineering, Kakinada?
What is the structure of the admission process at JNTUCEK?
faqs.answer: Find below the step-wise explanation fo the application process at JNTUCEK:Application Process:The University College of Engineering, Kakinada starts the admissions by submitting an online application. Applicants apply on the Andhra Pradesh State Council of Higher Education portal.Eligibility Criteria:Ensure that the minimum eligibility requirements of the preferred course are met before applying for admission to the same.Selection Rounds:The college accepts Andhra Pradesh EAMCET, GATE / Andhra Pradesh PGECET, APICET scores. Candidates who clear the entrance exam move to the last step in the admission process.Merit List Released and Counselling:JNTUCEK releases the merit lists round wise. Candidates whose names are appearing on the merit list are called for counseling procedure. In this final round, original documents are needed for the verification process.

faqs.question: Does University College of Engineering, Kakinada accept Andhra Pradesh EAMCET score?
faqs.answer: They use a conventional admissions procedure, therefore applicants must have passed the 10+2 with at least 50% of their grades in mathematics and physics as their major subjects. The EAMCET results (Engineering, Agriculture & Medical Common Entrance Test) will determine the selection process.

faqs.question: Can I join University College of Engineering, Kakinada without Andhra Pradesh EAMCET?
faqs.answer: University College of Engineering, Kakinada requiresAP EAMCET exam scoresfor admission to the BPharma course. Candidates must apply for the Andhra Pradesh EAMCET on the official website of Andhra Pradesh Engineering Agricultural and Pharmacy Common Entrance Test. Successful candidates in the Andhra Pradesh EAMCET entrance exam will secure admission to various institutions and colleges in Andhra Pradesh. Candidates must complete and submit the application form online to participate in the exam. Therefore, candidates cannot join University College of Engineering, Kakinada without Andhra Pradesh EAMCET.

reviews.review_heading: Over the past year, the university, which is no longer. Old College has brought many opportunities,
reviews.review_text: The CSE department alone has 3 labs along with the research lab with Wi-Fi provided, and they are accessible during working hours. Classrooms consist of projectors and smartboards. The hostels are pretty clean and provide a homely nature, whereas the food is decent too, with veg and also non veg. There is a medical dispensary within the college. The JNTUK stadium is available all the time with a track in the center and volleyball, kho-kho, and box cricket courts. Within the stadium, you will hav...

reviews.review_heading: The college is good.
reviews.review_text: Our department is very good to see, and our faculty is also very experienced. In the Andhra Pradesh state, our Jayanti Kakinada faculty is the most expensive faculty. That will teach teachers from their experience, and teaching is well in this college, but not short and narrow, but it is well.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best college for academics and placements with good campus life.
reviews.review_text: Classroom infrastructure is very good with Wi-Fi facilities, digital boards, and projectors. We also have separate libraries for separate departments and a central library with Wi-Fi and AC facilities. Hostels are okay with average food quality. We also have a dispensary on our campus for medical purposes.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement and satisfied with the teaching and infrastructure of the college.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are old, but the new hostel construction is going on. Already, they have constructed a new hostel for 1st years, and a 4th year hostel was built in 2019. For the remaining, a new hostel is being constructed. Departments have good infrastructure, and they are developing labs up to date.

reviews.review_heading: Good college. Worth studying for oneself.
reviews.review_text: I never went to college, but there is a facility of Wi-Fi. The quality of the facilities in our hostel, the quality of food available in the mess and canteen, sports, and games are above average. Sometimes there is no Wi-Fi in the hostel. The ground facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with our department because it got so many GATE ranks in 2024.
reviews.review_text: There are Wi-Fi facilities in the classrooms, labs, and library also. The infrastructure of classrooms and the library is very good. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is very good. There is also a dispensary which has very good facilities. Many sports and games competitions are conducted every year.

reviews.review_heading: Good results with no teacher.
reviews.review_text: JNTUK has good academic infrastructure (labs, library, Wi-Fi) and good facilities. Hostel facilities are available, but the quality of each is ok. Mess food and medical facilities are available on the campus. There are large sports fields and equipment for various sports on campus.

reviews.review_heading: It's a decent college with good academic support.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good in our departments, but not as good as much in hostels, especially the 1st year hostel is not very good. A new hostel is constructed for 1st year students, which is also good. Coming to the second year, third year and final year hostels, the hostels are very good, the mess food is also acceptable, with chicken twice a week.

reviews.review_heading: A good college absolutely worth for feels with a decent college life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of college departments are good with digital board and projectors and high-speed Wi-Fi is provided in the departments but the infrastructure of hostel is not much good there are som many mosquitoes and food is average chicken is kept twice a week .

reviews.review_heading: Completely dissatisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: College hostel is too bad, without any maintenance and cleanliness. Bathrooms and mess are not good. I am living in PG near the college GATE. Even the campus CSE department infrastructure is not as expected. Bad washrooms and small classrooms. Some juniors don’t have their own classroom.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: The college hostel is too bad, without any maintenance or cleanliness. Bathrooms and mess are not good. I am living in a PG near the college GATE. Even the campus CSE department infrastructure is not as expected. We have snakes roaming on our campus. Bad washrooms even in the department.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: The college hostel is too bad, without any maintenance or cleanliness. Bathrooms and mess are not good. I am living in a PG near the college GATE. Even the campus CSE department infrastructure is not as expected. We have ACs that don't work and fans that barely rotate. Bad washrooms even in the department.

reviews.review_heading: An average college, considering the fact that it is a government college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities are not up to the mark, and the systems in the college are not good enough for our branch. Compared to other branches, our branch does not have sufficient systems. Our branch, being a CS major, is given fewer resources compared to other branches.

reviews.review_heading: Good college and a decent campus life.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of classes is decent with a blackboard and digital board with a projector. But the infrastructure of hostels is quite bad especially boys hostel. In boys hostel, some rooms have fans that work very slowly, and mosquitoes are also present. The quality of mess is good they cook chicken twice a week. If we can adjust in the hostel, it will give us memorable experiences.

reviews.review_heading: JNTUK offers solid infrastructure, decent placements, but mixed reviews on faculty quality, exams.
reviews.review_text: At JNTUK, CSE department has equipped labs, Wi-Fi, and libraries. However, reviews for hostel facilities, mess food quality, and medical care vary, with some students reporting good experiences while others note issues. Sports facilities are available.

faqs.answer: A:    Nawab Shah Alam Khan College of Engineering and Technology (NSAKCET) courses are approved by eminent Government bodies such as AICTE. reviews_list.review_title: College is best in many ways.

review_content.Placements: Placement at Nawab Shah Alam Khan College of Engineering and Technology is very nice because they place students in top companies and some in government sector. The minimum percentage for placement is 55%, and the maximum percentage is 100%. The college is best at placing students.
review_content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is very good. College was built by Nawa Shah Alam Khan (The Nawab of Hyderabad) college looks like a palace. College has science labs, autocad lab, etc. College provides free Wi-Fi, and has big workshops.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The college is very good and get nice placements every year.

review_content.Placements: I am a diploma mechanical student at NSAKCET, batch 2024-2027. 70% of students got placed. The highest package is 4.2 LPA, the lowest is 1.8 LPA, and the average is 2.5 LPA. Top recruiters include Tata, L&T, and TVS. 60% of students got internships at BHEL and TAFE. Roles offered are engineer, supervisor, and technician.
review_content.Infrastructure: NSAKCET does not have a hostel service. The college is clean. We have library, computer labs, and an engineering drawing lab. The sports are available from the 2nd year because the college faculty first concentrates on the study. The teachers are well and very kind to students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: A good environment, where you can learn many things that will help you in your life.

review_content.Placements: In my course, the percentage of students who were placed is 70%. The highest was 12 LPA, the lowest was 3 LPA, and the average package offered was 6 LPA. TATA, AMAZON, MICROSOFT, etc are the recruiting companies. 80% of students got internships in my course in Amazon, Tech Mahindra, Wipro, and other companies. Top roles offered in my course were Assistant Engineer, Surveyor, Quantity Surveying, and Field Assistant.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure of my department were damn good, and the library was huge, with all Wi-Fi connections available. The classrooms were good. The quality of facilities in my hostel is good, and the quality of food available in the mess is also good. The medical facilities are awesome, and the sports and games are too good.

faqs.answer: Nawab Shah Alam Khan College of Engineering and Technology (NSAKCET) offers Degree and Diploma courses including 10 UG and 4 PG courses. Nawab Shah Alam Khan College of Engineering and Technology (NSAKCET) has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Information Technology, Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, VLSI Design, After 10th Diploma specializations in Civil Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering.

faqs.answer: Nawab Shah Alam Khan College of Engineering and Technology (NSAKCET) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed or appeared at the final year of the Diploma examination in Engineering conducted by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh. Candidates should have completed 16 years of age, as on 31st December of the year of admission. There is no upper age limit.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E./B.Tech. /AMIE in CSE/ CSIT/ Electronics & Computers Engg. /IT & Computer Science and Systems Engineering or equivalent from a UGC recognised University/ Institute. Preference will be given to GATE qualified candidates over TS PGECET qualified candidates. Candidate must have secured 50% marks in group subjects taken together in the qualifying examination (45% for reserved category).After 10th DiplomaCandidates must have passed 10th examination conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or from any other recognised board in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects, and obtained at least 35% marks in the qualifying examination. Candidate must have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% Marks in each subject. Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in March/April-2023, and whose results are yet to be declared are also eligible.

review_summary.college_name: Nawab Shah Alam Khan College of Engineering and Technology (NSAKCET) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Before pursuing your Bachelors please check the placement cell in college. There is no placement.

content.Placements: No one from the college is placed, and no company visited our college. 0 percent of students are placed. No one got internship, so please do not take admission in that college. Choose a better college, the top colleges in Hyderabad for a good career in your life its a request.
content.Infrastructure: There are no proper labs, there is no internet in the lab they bribe the AICTE for Autonomous Approval. There are no proper labs & no salary provided to the staff faculty, even the watchman complains regarding the salary which is the same as in the college such a big failure.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: My college has good faculty members and the management of the college is very good.

content.Placements: 70% of students were placed in my course. The highest package offered was 75 LPA, and the lowest package was 3 LPA. The top recruiting companies were Google, Microsoft, Amazon, Deloitte, Wipro, DLF, etc. The percentage of students who got internships was around 80%.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities provided in my college are in better condition which include big classrooms with CCTV, seminar halls, auditorium, well-conditioned computer labs, etc. The hostel has good management, and they provide food from the canteen and mess.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: College is best in many ways.

content.Placements: Placement at Nawab Shah Alam Khan College of Engineering and Technology is very nice because they place students in top companies and some in government sector. The minimum percentage for placement is 55%, and the maximum percentage is 100%. The college is best at placing students.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is very good. College was built by Nawa Shah Alam Khan (The Nawab of Hyderabad) college looks like a palace. College has science labs, autocad lab, etc. College provides free Wi-Fi, and has big workshops.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college is very good and get nice placements every year.

content.Placements: I am a diploma mechanical student at NSAKCET, batch 2024-2027. 70% of students got placed. The highest package is 4.2 LPA, the lowest is 1.8 LPA, and the average is 2.5 LPA. Top recruiters include Tata, L&T, and TVS. 60% of students got internships at BHEL and TAFE. Roles offered are engineer, supervisor, and technician.
content.Infrastructure: NSAKCET does not have a hostel service. The college is clean. We have library, computer labs, and an engineering drawing lab. The sports are available from the 2nd year because the college faculty first concentrates on the study. The teachers are well and very kind to students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: A good environment, where you can learn many things that will help you in your life.

content.Placements: In my course, the percentage of students who were placed is 70%. The highest was 12 LPA, the lowest was 3 LPA, and the average package offered was 6 LPA. TATA, AMAZON, MICROSOFT, etc are the recruiting companies. 80% of students got internships in my course in Amazon, Tech Mahindra, Wipro, and other companies. Top roles offered in my course were Assistant Engineer, Surveyor, Quantity Surveying, and Field Assistant.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure of my department were damn good, and the library was huge, with all Wi-Fi connections available. The classrooms were good. The quality of facilities in my hostel is good, and the quality of food available in the mess is also good. The medical facilities are awesome, and the sports and games are too good.
