reviews.review_heading: Before pursuing your Bachelors please check the placement cell in college. There is no placement.
reviews.review_text: There are no proper labs, there is no internet in the lab they bribe the AICTE for Autonomous Approval. There are no proper labs & no salary provided to the staff faculty, even the watchman complains regarding the salary which is the same as in the college such a big failure.

reviews.review_heading: My college has good faculty members and the management of the college is very good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided in my college are in better condition which include big classrooms with CCTV, seminar halls, auditorium, well-conditioned computer labs, etc. The hostel has good management, and they provide food from the canteen and mess.

reviews.review_heading: College is best in many ways.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is very good. College was built by Nawa Shah Alam Khan (The Nawab of Hyderabad) college looks like a palace. College has science labs, autocad lab, etc. College provides free Wi-Fi, and has big workshops.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very good and get nice placements every year.
reviews.review_text: NSAKCET does not have a hostel service. The college is clean. We have library, computer labs, and an engineering drawing lab. The sports are available from the 2nd year because the college faculty first concentrates on the study. The teachers are well and very kind to students.

reviews.review_heading: A good environment, where you can learn many things that will help you in your life.
reviews.review_text:
The facilities and infrastructure of my department were damn good, and the library was huge, with all Wi-Fi connections available. The classrooms were good.
The quality of facilities in my hostel is good, and the quality of food available in the mess is also good. The medical facilities are awesome, and the sports and games are too good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good engineering college across the city.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good. We get strong internet connections across the campus. The canteen provides hygienic and tasty food. Sports and games are played a lot in our college. Our classrooms are neat. Every classroom has a very open space and good benches.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Nawab Shah Alam Khan College of Engineering and Technology (NSAKCET).
reviews.review_text: Our college is situated in the middle of the city of Malakpet. This college was built in 2008 and it was built by the sons of Nawabshah. Collage infrastructure is good and quite clean and also updated with new infrastructure and the building is old but renovated.

reviews.review_heading: College life in Nawab Shah Alam Khan College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, with well-maintained labs and classrooms, and it has a good ground for extracurricular activities. The canteen is well-maintained, and there is a sports tournament every year. The medical facility is also good. The games we play include football, basketball, kabaddi, and the indoor games are chess and table tennis.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is average. It is not worth the money. But the infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: Average infrastructure but not poor. Wi-Fi is there daily at 25 MBps. Classrooms are neat and there is a library located on the 2nd floor of C Block. The canteen is good but a little bit expensive and the food is not very hygienic here. The labs are well maintained and a sports field and basketball court are also there.

reviews.review_heading: Overall good but not in terms of placements and student satisfaction.
reviews.review_text: This college has a very good or may be one of the best infrastructure that I have seen. Very well developed and maintained infrastructure but that is all because in other aspects it is not good. This college has been developing from a very long time and it has come a very long way.

reviews.review_heading: If you need a good college then you can take admission in it.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average. Wi-Fi is not available. The laboratory is very good with experienced lab assistants. Classrooms are average as compared to other engineering colleges. The food quality is good. Canteen is not properly maintained because management periodically changes the staff members. Medical facilities are good because the hospital is located near our campus. Sports and games are very good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Nawab Shah Alam Khan College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the facilities are average.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good because it is situated in the center of the city with buildings, gardens, etc. Wi-Fi was not available on campus. Classrooms were average. The library of our college has only a few books. The hostel facility was not available in our college. Our college provided sports and games facilities.

reviews.review_heading: If you're looking for engineering admission, then please don't take admission to NSAKCET.
reviews.review_text: There is very less facility available in the college, like no water, and no Wi-Fi. The staff doesn't have any knowledge about the rules and regulations. If you have any problem related to your studies or exams, if you go to them, they will simply tell you to go to University, OU or JNTUH.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied because of the quality of education and placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was average, but there was no Wi-Fi. The library was not up-to-date. The books were getting very old, and some of them even had pages falling out. There was no playground or any accommodation for non-local students. The canteen was good but expensive. The college did not have the necessary equipment for many of the subjects.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth to consider Jain College of Engineering - JCE as a good Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Jain College of Engineering - JCE is a reputed institute for B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Jain College of Engineering - JCE has a rating of 3.7 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4 on campuslife, 3.1 on placements, 4.1 on faculty and 3.9 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Jain College of Engineering - JCE Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty, good infrastructure, and facilities.

content.Placements: Above 60% of students were placed in our college. The highest package is around 6 LPA that a student can be offered in the BE course, the lowest is 3 LPA, and the average is around 3-6 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Bosch and Accenture. 50% of students got internships in companies like Accenture and Bosch. The top roles offered are Salesforce Dev and software development.
content.Infrastructure: The BE course is supported by adequate facilities and infrastructure to create a conducive learning environment, while Wi-Fi connectivity is not available in our department. Classrooms are well-structured and spacious and maintained clean to provide a comfortable setting. A library is available for students, offering access to a range of academic resources. Food quality is average in the hostel and Wi-Fi is available in the hostel. Hostel is available only for men. Medical facilities are not available, but nearby hostels have hospitals to approach. Indoor games are not provided by the hostel, but outdoor games are available to play on the college grounds.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: A college with good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Placement opportunities are good. The average salary package offered is around 3 LPA - 4 LPA. Companies like training institutes and as well as CRINSUN Technologies visited the college. Some of the students got internships at CRINSUN Technologies. After internships, they have been offered some roles in the same company based on the technical knowledge gained by students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is well-maintained. The Wi-Fi facility is beneficial for students. Labs and classrooms are good. The library plays a major role in the college life as it is helpful for students to gain extra knowledge.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering-AI, Machine Learning - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: The batch of 2023-27 of artificial intelligence and machine learning is the first batch of Jain College of Engineering, Belagavi. As AI is in the trend currently most of the companies are interested in hiring from this department. Also, many students get hired every year.
content.Infrastructure: Good Wi-Fi service and well clean and maintained labs with all the required facilities are available in the lab. The library is so amazing, and it has a variety of books such as academic books from every department. Not only the UG books they also have reference books as well as post-graduation books.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Nowadays, the college is improving and hope in the future, the students will get more help.

content.Placements: Most of the students were placed in our course. But the highest package offered was 6 lacs per annum. The average package offered was 4 lacs per annum. The lowest package offered was about 2–2.5 lacs per annum. Some of the top companies are HP, Infosys, and HCL, which are the recruiters for our college students. 70 percent of students got internships in our course.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities that are available in our course or department are classrooms, benches, libraries, and labs. There is no hostel available at our college and students live in some rooms. Good-quality food is available in the college mess and canteen. There are also sports facilities and medical facilities in case of emergencies.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good placements in 2021 but not satisfied.

content.Placements: Last year, approximately 60% students got placed. The highest package is 8 LPA and the lowest is 3 LPA. Almost all the students did internship from different companies.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are not much good. Infrastructure is good for all. Wi-Fi is provided but it is limited. Labs are good but not with sufficient equipment. Maintenance is not good. Classrooms and library are better than labs. Hostel is very small and not well maintained.
content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful and qualified and but their teaching quality is poor. Exams are difficult but students almost pass in every semester. But not supportive social activities, sports and other activities are there. Faculty members are not enough experienced but they are knowledgeable.

faqs.question: How can I get into Jain College of Engineering - JCE for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Jain College of Engineering - JCE has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed Diploma in Engineering/Technology from an AICTE approved Institution with minimum 45 % marks (40% for candidates belonging to reserved category).M.E./M.TechCandidates must have passed qualifying examination or equivalent examination as prescribed by the Competent Authority and obtained an aggregate minimum of 50% marks (45% of marks in case of SC, ST and Category-I candidates) taken together in all the subjects of all the years/ semesters of the Degree Examination from any recognised institute/university.
Final year students can also apply on provisional basis.
Candidates must have valid GATE score.MCACandidate should have studied Maths at 10+2 stage or at graduation level.

faqs.question: How much is the intake across all courses being offerred at Jain College of Engineering - JCE?
faqs.answer: The overall seats available across all courses offered by Jain College of Engineering - JCE is up to 798. Good thing to know is that Jain College of Engineering - JCE has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.

Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at Jain College of Engineering - JCE. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA/PGDM admission was 30629 in the General category under the AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 11301, while in 2023, it was 16406.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jain College of Engineering - JCE.
reviews.review_text: There is a well-maintained college hostel with attached separate washrooms and Wi-Fi connectivity. reviews.review_heading: It has better infrastructure, but all other things are not good.

Even the bus facility is not appreciable, and the buses are always very crowded. Open audit of the college is good, but a closed audit is bad. The college is very small, and there is no good ventilation.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with college and their facilities but they should improve in placement area.

College also have open and closed auditorium where different functions are held college also provide you hostel facilities, xerox centres and canteen.

highlights.summary: ICFAI University, Raipur admissions 2026 are open to all courses. Interested candidates can apply by visiting the official college website. A few more updates are given below:

college_info.intro: The flagship programmes offered at ICFAI Raipur are BTech and MBA. The university offers these programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. Further, the university offers these programmes for a duration of 4 and 2 years, respectively, with a comprehensive curriculum. The Institute of Chartered Financial Analysts of India University Raipur courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students to prepare them for the industry. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at ICFAI University Chhattisgarh in the table provided below:

placements.overview: Over the past few years, the ICFAI Raipur has been ranked by various ranking bodies under multiple categories, mainly Management. The university has received 'Education Impact Award (to VC Prof. S.D. Pandey) by IIRF in 2026. It has also received 'Gyaan Dhara Award' by the Govt. of Chhattisgarh in 2025. In 2021, it has been awarded as the Prestigious Brands of India by the Economic Times. A few of the important are mentioned below:

faqs.answer: A:    ICFAI University placement report 2025 has been released on the official website. Students should visit the visit the official website and click on the placement tab to view the salary package and recruiter details of 2025 and past year placements.
faqs.question: Has the ICFAI University Raipur placement report been released?

faqs.answer: A:    The overall highest, average and lowest package offered during ICFAI University placements 2025 and 2024 are mentioned below:Particulars Placement Statistics 2024Placement Statistics 2025Highest packageINR 9 LPAINR 10.5 LPAAverage packageINR 3 LPABetween INR 2.6 LPA and 4.8 LPALowest packageINR 2.5 LPANA
faqs.question: What are the placement packages offered at ICFAI University Raipur?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, University Raipur offers internships to MBA students. In 2024, 1 student received stipend of INR 11,000 per month, as per the annual report 2025.
faqs.question: Does ICFAI University Raipur offer internships to MBA students?

faqs.answer: A:    ICFAI University Raipur provides good placements to its students. During the placement drive 2025, overall highest package was INR 10.5 LPA and the average package was between INR 2.6 LPA and 4.8 LPA. In 2024, overall highest and average package offered was 9 LPA and 3 LPA.
faqs.question: How are the ICFAI University Raipur placements?

faqs.answer: A:    Aspirants must complete graduation in any discipline with a minimum of 45% aggregate to apply for ICFAI University Raipur MBA programme. Students in the final year and awaiting results can also apply. Besides, admission to the MBA course is based on merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam and performance in the personal interview round.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MBA at ICFAI University Raipur?

faqs.answer: A:    ICFAI University Raipur eligibility criteria specifies the minimum qualification and aggregate required to apply for a course. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 and graduation for PG programmes. Below is the eligibility for popular courses of ICFAI University, Raipur:Course NameCommon EligibilityBTechClass 12 or equivalent with at least 45% aggregate with pass in each of the Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry and EnglishBBA/ BBA (Hons)Class 12 or equivalent in any discipline with at least 40% aggregateBCAClass 12 or equivalent in any discipline with at least 40% aggregateMBAGraduation in any discipline with a minimum of 45% aggregateMTechBE/ BTech in respective discipline with at least 50% aggregate
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for admission at ICFAI University, Raipur?

faqs.answer: A:    ICFAI University offers admission to most of the UG and PG courses based on merit of the aspirants in the qualifying exam. The university evaluates the application forms of the candidates for selection. Besides, admission to some of the courses is entrance-based. The university informs the selected candidates about the interview schedule. Shortlisted aspirants need to further pass the interview round for final selection.
faqs.question: Can I join ICFAI University Raipur directly?

faqs.answer: A:    The hostel at ICFAI University Raipur is around 65000 per year .It has a good maintenance of hostel according to the price.The menu will be alter according to students' benefits.Finally, according to the price, the benefits are good.

overview_faqs.question: Is ICFAI University Raipur worth all the hype?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, ICFAI University Raipur is worth all the hype as it is recognised by UGC and has been accredited by NCTE for BEd programmes. ICFAI University Chhattisgarh has also been approved by the Bar Council of India (BCI) and offers AICTE-approved courses to students. Further, the university has decent connections with renowned companies such as Tech Mahindra, Aditya Birla, Deloitte, Colgate, DE Shaw, L&T, ITC Limited, etc.

overview_faqs.question: What is unique about The ICFAI University, Raipur?
overview_faqs.answer: The Unique in ICFAI University, Raipur is conducting the rxamination with a sequence pattern and having Sports every year among 4 groups. Finally, the canteen and Hostel maintenance is unique.

review_summary.college_name: ICFAI University Raipur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: College is good but I'm concerned of the packages.

content.Placements: 30% of students were placed in my course. The highest package was 4 lpa and the average package was 1.5 - 3 lpa. TATA is the top recruiting company. 50% of students got internships in companies like Tata, Jio, and Havell's.
content.Infrastructure: In college, free Wi-Fi is available, and while in my hostel, they are not installing Wi-Fi on the first floor. While the facilities of the lab, classroom, and library are good. In my hostel, the quality of food is good, but they mostly use gravy, which is tasteless, and they use it to give south Indian food.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I'm not fully satisfied with college, but its good.

content.Placements: Only 10% to 20% of students get placed in my course. The highest package we can get is 2 to 3 LPA. And no top companies came for recruiting; just some random local companies showed up. In my batch, no one got the internships, but my juniors got at least more than 50% of the internships, of course, at local companies. Random roles are offered sometimes, which is good but not guaranteed.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the hostel and mess is good, but the food is not good at all; it got worse with time. Plus, charges are high for mess. Library and labs are also good for the students practical knowledge, but library books are all outdated and not used, and those that are used are not available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I would recommend joining this college.

content.Placements: Above 75% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered is 18 LPA. The average salary package offered is 11 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 9 LPA. Top recruiting companies are HCL, Deloitte, etc. Students who get above 75% are eligible for internships. Internships depend on students' interests.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good. All benches are good. Our college has air conditioners. Wi-Fi is available 24X7 in our college. Labs and the library are very helpful. The hostel is very comfortable for students. It provides food according to students' favor. The menu will be changed if students are not satisfied. Medical facilities are available in the hostel. It has an ambulance.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the quality of teachers, hostel, and canteen facilities.

content.Placements: In our batch, all the students get placements offers but due to the reason of further studying, almost all students were denied the offer. The college provides internships in various local as well as international companies, but they also give choices to the students for selecting the companies in which they were interested.
content.Infrastructure: The canteen was decent, with a clean environment, and hostel rooms were good as well. The campus is very good, it provides big ground where cricket, football, etc., were played without any problem.
content.Faculty: Almost all the teachers of the ICFAI University Raipur were helpful. They all were very knowledgeable in their respective fields, they provide important notes, and also organised timely classes and tests for the preparation of main exams as well as for the development of the students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Students studying in this college can have a bright future.

content.Placements: Students are scoring almost 70-80% in all semesters. Top recruiting companies of our college are Tata, Infosys, IBM, etc. The salary package offered is 10 to 20 LPA. Almost all the students have completed their internships in different companies. Designing microchips are used for software products like computers, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is good, and we can get a good signal from Wi-Fi. Labs are wide and have good equipment. Faculty members in labs are good and also have the necessary equipment. Classrooms are very clean, and the atmosphere in our college, as well as classrooms, is also good. The library is also very good.

admission_overview.title: ICFAI University, Raipur Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: ICFAI University, Raipur admissions are primarily merit-based. The university considers scores in entrance exams such as CLAT, CG Pre-B.Ed Entrance Exam, etc. for admission to specific courses. ICFAI University Raipur offers courses, such as BTech, BBA, MBA, etc., at the UG and PG levels. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers doctorate and diploma courses. The university offers courses in various streams such as Engineering, Business and Management, Law etc. The application process at ICFAI University, Raipur is conducted online. Download ICFAI University Raipur Brochure

eligibility_selection.title: ICFAI Raipur Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: ICFAI Raipur admissions are based on merit and personal interview rounds for most of the courses. To get admission in ICFAI Raipur courses, students must meet the eligibility. The university considers entrance exam scores for BA LLB (Hons), B.Ed, etc. Candidates must also fulfill the minimum eligibility requirements for the respective courses. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 whereas graduation is required for PG programmes. admission_process.title: ICFAI University, Raipur Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: ICFAI University, Raipur admission processis open. Students must first fill out the application form to participate in the selection rounds. The step by-step application process:
Application Process 2026
Students can apply through official website of the institute. Pay the application fee of INR 500 towards the cost using Credit/Debit Card (Visa/Master Card/Citibank Card)
Selection Rounds

The university evaluates the application forms of the aspirants. While evaluating applicants for admission, the university gives due weightage to academic distinction, awards in sports/ cultural events, debates, quizzes and other extra-curricular activities. For BA LLB (Hons), B.Ed and PhD, admission is entrance-based. Once selected, applicants are called for a personal interview round.
Admission Confirmation
The admission decision is communicated to candidates after the interview process. All the shortlisted aspirants are required to pay theICFAI University Raipur feetowards confirmation of a seat.
ICFAI University, Raipur Fees 2026

ICFAI University Raipuroffers courses in Engineering, Business and Management Studies and IT and Software are available to applicants. The different courses offered at ICFAI University Raipur have different course fees. Candidates must pay theICFAI University Raipur feefor the course they have chosen given that they are accepted through the ICFAI University Raipur admission process. courses_data.description: ICFAI University, Raipur offers a two-year full-time MBA programme divided into four semesters. During the MBA programme, students need to undergo a summer internship programme of 10 weeks in the summer term after completion of the first year. Admission to the MBA course is merit-based. Candidates need to complete graduation in any discipline with at least 45% aggregate to apply for MBA.ICFAI University Raipur MBA feesis INR 2.3 lakh.

faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for admission to MBA at ICFAI University Raipur?
faqs.answer: No, candidates do not require qualifying an entrance exam for admission to MBA course of ICFAI University Raipur. Aspirants are selected based on their merit in the last qualifying exam and performance in the personal interview round. The minimum qualification required to apply for the MBA programme is graduation in any discipline with at least 45% aggregate.

The selection is based on merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam. Selected candidates further need to pass a personal interview round conducted by the university. Once the selection process is over, candidates need to pay an admission fee to confirm their seat.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for B.Tech at ICFAI University Raipur?
faqs.answer: Candidates must pass Class 12 or equivalent with at least 45% aggregate with pass in each of the Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry and English to apply for ICFAI University Raipur BTech programme. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for admission at ICFAI University, Raipur?
faqs.answer: ICFAI University Raipur eligibility criteria specifies the minimum qualification and aggregate required to apply for a course. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 and graduation for PG programmes. faqs.question: What is the fees of BTech at ICFAI University?
faqs.answer: ICFAI University, Raipur BTech fees is INR 2.4 Lacs - INR 3.2 lakh. ICFAI University, Raipur fee structure includes many components. The total fees may differ at the time of payment due to the variables of the fee structure.

courses_data.name: ICFAI University, Raipur BBA Admission 2026
courses_data.description: ICFAI University Raipur offers a full-time BBA programme for three years at the UG level. The university also offers a four-year BBA (Hons) course. Aspirants who have completed Class 12 or its equivalent in any discipline with at least 40% aggregate and above are eligible to apply for the BBA programme. The selection to the course is based on qualifying exam score of the candidate.

faqs.question: Is it easy to get admission to BBA at ICFAI University Raipur?
faqs.answer: To get into ICFAI University Raipur for a BBA course, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. ICFAI University Raipur offers full-time BBA courses of three years' duration. Students can get into this course based on application and interview. Apart from the selection criteria, students must pass Class 12 (common eligibility).

faqs.question: What is the application fee for BTech courses at ICFAI University Raipur?
faqs.answer: After filling out the application form for the BTech course at ICFAI University Raipur online/offline, candidates are required to pay the application fee through net banking/ DD/ UPI, etc. The application fee for the course is INR 500. The application fee is non-refundable.The fee amount mentioned is sourced from the official website/sanctioning body and is subject to change.Therefore, it is indicative

faqs.question: Is ICFAI University Raipur MBA admission open?
faqs.answer: Yes, for the academic year 2026, the registration for MBA course at ICFAI University Raipur is open. The selection of applicants for all programs is made through application and interview. While evaluating applicants for admission, due weightage is given to academic distinction, awards in sports/cultural events, debates, quizzes and other extra co-curricular activities.

faqs.question: Can I join ICFAI University Raipur directly?
faqs.answer: ICFAI University offers admission to most of the UG and PG courses based on merit of the aspirants in the qualifying exam. The university evaluates the application forms of the candidates for selection. Besides, admission to some of the courses is entrance-based. The university informs the selected candidates about the interview schedule. Shortlisted aspirants need to further pass the interview round for final selection.

faqs.question: How can I get admission at ICFAI University Raipur?
faqs.answer: ICFAI University Raipur admissions are merit-based for most of the courses. Aspirants are selected based on their score and qualifying exam and performance in the personal interview round. Besides, the selection to BA LLB (Hons) programme is based on CLAT or LSAT score. For B.Ed, admission is based on CG pre-B.Ed entrance exam conducted by Chattisgarh. Selected candidates are further called for a personal interview round for final selection.

faqs.question: Is entrance exam required for admission to ICFAI University, Raipur?
faqs.answer: ICFAI University, Raipur considers entrance exam score for a few courses. The university accepts CLAT or LSAT scores for admission to BA LLB (Hons) programme. The selection for B.Ed course is based on Pre-B.Ed entrance exam. For all other programmes of ICFAI University, Raipur, admissions are based on merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam and performance in the personal interview round.

faqs.question: What is the admission process of ICFAI University, Raipur?
faqs.answer: ICFAI University, Raipur admissionis open. The admission process of ICFAI University, Raipur is given below:Students can apply through official website of the institute. Pay the application fee of INR 500.The university evaluates the application forms of the aspirants. While evaluating applicants for admission. Once selected, applicants are called for a personal interview round.The admission decision is communicated to candidates after the interview process.All the shortlisted aspirants are required to pay the ICFAI University Raipur fee towards confirmation of a seat.

placement_data.title: ICFAI University Raipur Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: According to the latest data available on the official website, the highest and average package offered to BTech / MCA students during ICFAI University Raipur placements 2025 was INR 10.5 LPA and 4.8 LPA . MBA students received highest and average package of 9 LPA and 4.3 LPA in 2025. For UG programs including BBA , BCom and BCA , overall highest and average package recorded was 6.5 LPA and 2.6 LPA.
Earlier, in 2024 , as per the annual report 2025, overall highest and average package recorded was INR 9 LPA and 3 LPA .

faqs.question: How are the ICFAI University Raipur placements?
faqs.answer: ICFAI University Raipur provides good placements to its students. During the placement drive 2025, overall highest package was INR 10.5 LPA and the average package was between INR 2.6 LPA and 4.8 LPA. In 2024, overall highest and average package offered was 9 LPA and 3 LPA.

faqs.question: What is the ICFAI University Raipur placement truth? Does it really give a 100% placement record?
faqs.answer: The course-wise eligible students and students placed during ICFAI University placements 2024 is mentioned below: Course Eligible Students 2024 Students Opted Out 2024 Students Placed 2024 BTech 28 0 16 BSc 12 12 0 MBA 11 6 3 BBA 26 23 2 BCom 26 7 6 BCA 20 18 0

faqs.question: What are the placement packages offered at ICFAI University Raipur?

faqs.question: How are MBA placements at ICFAI University Raipur?
faqs.answer: The highest and average package recorded during ICFAI University Raipur MBA placements 2025 was 9 LPA and 4.3 LPA. In 2024, 3 students were placed and 6 students opted out of placements out of 11 eligible students.

faqs.question: Does ICFAI University Raipur offer internships to MBA students?
faqs.answer: Yes, University Raipur offers internships to MBA students. In 2024, 1 student received stipend of INR 11,000 per month, as per the annual report 2025.

faqs.question: What is the tuition fee for MBA course at ICFAI University Raipur?
faqs.answer: The tuition-fee for the MBA programme at ICFAI University Raipur is INR 2.3 lakh. The programme fee is to be paid in equal installments as shown against the MBA course, as per ICFAI University Raipur released.

reviews.review_heading: College is good but I'm concerned of the packages.
reviews.review_text:
In college, free Wi-Fi is available, and while in my hostel, they are not installing Wi-Fi on the first floor.
While the facilities of the lab, classroom, and library are good.
In my hostel, the quality of food is good, but they mostly use gravy, which is tasteless, and they use it to give south Indian food.

reviews.review_heading: I'm not fully satisfied with college, but its good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the hostel and mess is good, but the food is not good at all; it got worse with time. Plus, charges are high for mess. Library and labs are also good for the students practical knowledge, but library books are all outdated and not used, and those that are used are not available.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend joining this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. All benches are good. Our college has air conditioners. Wi-Fi is available 24X7 in our college. Labs and the library are very helpful. The hostel is very comfortable for students. It provides food according to students' favor. The menu will be changed if students are not satisfied. Medical facilities are available in the hostel. It has an ambulance.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the quality of teachers, hostel, and canteen facilities.
reviews.review_text: The canteen was decent, with a clean environment, and hostel rooms were good as well. The campus is very good, it provides big ground where cricket, football, etc., were played without any problem.

reviews.review_heading: Students studying in this college can have a bright future.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is good, and we can get a good signal from Wi-Fi. Labs are wide and have good equipment. Faculty members in labs are good and also have the necessary equipment. Classrooms are very clean, and the atmosphere in our college, as well as classrooms, is also good. The library is also very good.

reviews.review_heading: An average college for study.
reviews.review_text: There is only one main building where all types of courses are conducted. For B.Tech, there is a lab available but no proper staff. The hostel is under construction which may be completed in more than 2 years (for both boys and girls). Overall, the campus is under development. There are no bus facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is quite satisfying and qualifying as it is the best university.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. The quality and the independence of the college is good enough to tell the college is the best among all the best colleges. The Wi-Fi facility is available for all the students is good. The sports ground is bad in all-cause, and the games are conducted at the regular intervals.

reviews.review_heading: Fully satisfied with the teaching of the faculty as they are highly qualified and teach properly.
reviews.review_text:
The facilities which are given to us are Wi-Fi enabled campus, a library which is in a large area, medical facilities, football court, gym, and canteen. The food available in the canteen is worth its price (tasty). The hostel facility is not so good. The ground is also not a proper one. The infrastructure is fine but lacks many things.
There is no proper auditorium.

college_info.college_name: ICFAI University Raipur

data.description: The ICFAI University, Raipur, is a leading multi-disciplinary university famous for its commitment to inclusive and technological advancement. The ICFAI University, Raipur faculty is well-educated with decades worth of expertise in both academia and industry. The university boasts a diverse faculty pool with members having an average experience of 15 to 20 years , including experts from premier national institutions. The team is led by Vice Chancellor Prof. (Dr.) Shiv Dayal Pandey, who is a recipient of the Gyaan Dhara Award 2025 by the CM of Chhattisgarh.

In case a student withdraws his/ her seat before the start of the course, his/ her total fee isrefunded after deduction of INR 1,000 only.In case a student surrenders his/ her seat after the beginning of the course and before /on last date of admission to that course, he/she get fee with proportionate deduction oftotal monthly fee (full fee including development and other charges) and proportionate total hostel rent (all charges).In case a student withdraws his /her seat after the last date of admission to that course, he /she does not get any refund.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth studying in IKGPTU?
overview_faqs.answer: IKGPTU, earlier known as Punjab Technical University was established under Act of the State Legislature in 1997. The university affiliates 120+ AICTE and 65 UGC-approved colleges. The university offers 25+ courses at its main campus. Candidates can go for the university as it offers a wide range of courses and practical knowledge to the students. It uses new techniques and methods to teach students in modern and innovative ways. It also has received a mandate to start Centres of Excellence to help students to grow in research, development and their training.

review_summary.college_name: PTU Kapurthala Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My college provides a decent academic environment with satisfactory infrastructure.

content.Placements: The placement scenario at my college is average and improving gradually. Around 50% or below of college graduates got placed through campus drives. The average package is 4 LPA. The recruiting companies include TCS, Wipro, Infosys, and local MNCs.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is satisfactory and supports students as well. The college is well-equipped with Wi-Fi and other services. The library has a good collection of academic books. The washrooms are not too good, but they require some maintenance and cleaning.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Guru Nanak Institute of Management and Technology.

content.Placements: I have not yet completed my degree, so I can move to the placement level. I am in my second year, but I have seen a lot of companies reach out on the placement day. The package offered varies from 1.5 LPA to 4-5 LPA. Rest, I do not have further knowledge yet.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides minimal facilities, such as a computer lab and a hardware lab. There is a medical room inside the campus. There is no Wi-Fi for students. Classrooms are clean and nice. There is no hostel in this institution, and it is mainly local here. There is a canteen. The food served is decent, not good, and not bad.

individual_reviews.course: M.Pharma. in Pharmaceutical Analysis - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It's upto you what you want.

content.Placements: As I'm in my first year, I don't know about the placements. As our seniors speak, mostly students are placed in different QA sectors or R&D sectors in the industry. Salary is given mostly between Rs. 30,000 and Rs. 35,000 per month. Some companies like Cipla, Mankind Aurobindo Pharma offer internships.

There are two hostels for boys and one hostel for girls inside the campus. Mess food is average. Non-vegetarian food is not allowed on campus.

Gujral Punjab Technical University (IKGPTU), formerly known as Punjab Technical University (PTU) offers courses at undergraduate (UG), postgraduate (PG) and Doctoral levels. The courses are offered in Engineering, Design, Mass Communication & Media, Medicine & Health Sciences, Hospitality & Travel, Architecture & Planning and Commerce at main campus, constituent campus and via affiliated colleges.I.K. Gujral Punjab Technical Universityalso has aDistance Education Departmentthat offers the same courses as the main campus.

Candidates interested in taking admission at I.K. Gujral Punjab Technical University (IKGPTU), formerly known as Punjab Technical University (PTU) must fulfil the course requirements constituted by the university.IGKPTU courses admissionare both merit and entrance exams based depending upon the course. Given below is the completeadmission process for IGKPTU:
Step 1: IGKPTU Application Process 2025

Candidates willing to take admission at I.K. Gujral Punjab Technical University (IKGPTU) must fill out the prescribed entrance exam application form as well as the university’s application form by paying the required registration fee for final submission.
Step 2: IGKPTU Selection Criteria

I.K. Gujral Punjab Technical University (IKGPTU) admission is merit-based for most of the courses. The university evaluates the application form of the aspirants to confirm their eligibility. Besides, the selection for some of the courses is based on the entrance exam. The university releases a merit list to announce the names of the selected candidates.
Step 3: IGKPTU Final Seat Allotment
On successful completion of the counselling process, candidates will be required to report to the admission cell at IGKPTU for document verification and fee payment for final seat allotment.

Gujral Punjab Technical University (IKGPTU), formerly known as Punjab Technical University (PTU), candidates must have a minimum of 45% aggregate in class 12. Candidates having a valid Class 12 score will be shortlisted for the counselling programme followed by document verification and tuition fee payment leading to final seat allotment in the BTech programme.

eligibility: Accepting Exams:MAT, XAT, MAH CET, APICET, PU MET, CMAT, CAT, CUET-PG, GMAT, MET
courses_data.description: I.K. Gujral Punjab Technical University (IKGPTU) (earlier known as PTU) offers an MBA course of two years divided into four semesters. The selection for MBA course is through a centralised counselling procedure. PTU shortlists students for counselling as per the eligibility and selection criteria. Candidates who have passed a minimum of three-year bachelor's degree are eligible to apply for MBA.

faqs.question: How can I get a seat in MBA at IKGPTU?
faqs.answer: Candidates are offered seat in IK Gujral Punjab Technical University MBA based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants must complete their bachelor's degree with at least 50% aggregate for MBA. There is a 5% relaxation in the aggregate for IKGPTU MBA course. The university prepares the merit list based on the qualifying exam score of the candidates.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for admission to an MBA at IKGPTU?
faqs.answer: Aspirants need to pass a minimum of three-years bachelor's degree with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category) to apply for IKGPTU MBA programme. The merit list for MBA course is prepared based on percentage of the candidates in the qualifying examination.

faqs.question: How can I take admission in I. K Gujral Punjab Technical University (IKGPTU)?
faqs.answer: IKGPTU accepts admissions to programmes in either a direct way or through counseling. Students who are interested in pursuing any programme at the university must have to apply beforehand. Students can apply through the official website of the university and complete the application by paying the application fees, i.e. non-refundable. Candidates can apply to the programmes as soon as the applications start for the session.

faqs.question: What is the fee refund policy at IKGPTU?
faqs.answer: IK Gujral University follows a fee refund policy in case of cancellation of admission. In case a student withdraws his/ her seat before the start of the course, his/ her total fee is refunded after deduction of INR 1,000 only. In case a student surrenders his/ her seat after the beginning of the course and before /on last date of admission to that course, he/she get fee with proportionate deduction of total monthly fee (full fee including development and other charges) and proportionate total hostel rent (all charges). In case a student withdraws his /her seat after the last date of admission to that course, he /she does not get any refund.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Guru Nanak Dev Engineering CollegeReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: My college provides a decent academic environment with satisfactory infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is satisfactory and supports students as well. The college is well-equipped with Wi-Fi and other services. The library has a good collection of academic books. The washrooms are not too good, but they require some maintenance and cleaning.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Guru Nanak Institute of Management and TechnologyReviewed on 17 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Guru Nanak Institute of Management and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The college provides minimal facilities, such as a computer lab and a hardware lab. There is a medical room inside the campus. There is no Wi-Fi for students. Classrooms are clean and nice. There is no hostel in this institution, and it is mainly local here. There is a canteen. The food served is decent, not good, and not bad.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Chandigarh Engineering College, Chandigarh Group of Colleges, LandranReviewed on 12 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, Good teachers.
reviews.review_text: The labs and Wi-Fi are actually great, and the library has every book I? Ve needed. Hostel life is okay rooms are decent, but mess food is definitely hit-or-miss. Canteen snacks and the sports complex are the real highlights here. Solid experience, enjoying.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Chandigarh Group of Colleges, LandranReviewed on 10 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Overall, a good college for your career development.
reviews.review_text: A good infrastructure with good services and environment, hostel food is a bit bad, but overall facilities are good, safe for girls, strict guards at the gate don't allow outsiders in college. The canteens are available for day scholars and students. Overall have a good infrastructure. Labs are available for better understanding, and students can experience real-time experiences in this college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by ISF College of PharmacyReviewed on 7 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It's upto you what you want.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. Wi-Fi is working on the authorised Laptop. Labs are spacious and have all the apparatus used in industry. Classrooms are good to have air conditioning. There are two hostels for boys and one hostel for girls inside the campus. Mess food is average. Non-vegetarian food is not allowed on campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Chandigarh Group of Colleges, LandranReviewed on 31 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good college to experience.
reviews.review_text: Department's infrastructure and facilities are good, there is Wi-Fi, labs are there, classrooms for different sections are there, library is there, on other hand, the food in hostel is average, infrastructure is good, canteen is good, medical facilities are good, sports and games are genuinely good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by ISF College of PharmacyReviewed on 25 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College is good for studies and studious students who like only to study.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Sports activities are negligible. Labs are also very good. The library is good too, but the college does not have a big campus. Teachers will impose a fine if we misbehave or do anything they don't like.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by ISF College of PharmacyReviewed on 12 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a budget-friendly M.Pharma college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. There are two hostels for boys. Wi-Fi is not working. Mess food is only vegetarian. Classrooms are spacious and digitally updated. Labs are spacious and have all apparatus used in industry. The library is good. All types of pharmacy and technology books are available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Chandigarh Engineering College, Chandigarh Group of Colleges, LandranReviewed on 11 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Average and budget-friendly option with normal placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is just average, classrooms are pretty much normal, and there is no Wi-fi. The library is also not that big and has just basic course-related books. Labs are also not that highly developed. The boys' hostel is good, but in the girls' hostel, many problems do occur, and the mess food is not that good, but they do have variety, and food is provided on time. Basic medical facilities are available on campus, and there is an arrangement of sports too. Also, a plus point is that the hos...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Chandigarh Group of Colleges, Landran
reviews.review_text: The entire campus is Wi-Fi connected, and the classrooms are big enough. They have proper fans, lighting, and exhaust fans. Every classroom has a projector and a whiteboard. Hostel food is average, sometimes good, and sometimes bad. Non-veg food is available on selected days in the hostel mess. Medical services are available 24/7 with an ambulance for emergencies. Grounds for football, volleyball, basketball, and badminton are available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by ISF College of PharmacyReviewed on 9 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This college depends on your budget and expectations, so read the reviews carefully.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. All apparatus used in the industry, such as HPLC and UV, are available. Wi-Fi is very restricted, and there is no network in the classrooms. There are two boys’ hostels. Canteen food is average, and only vegetarian food is allowed. Classrooms and the library are good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Swami Vivekanand Faculty of Technology and ManagementReviewed on 5 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The overall experience of the college is really good, with teachers and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is also good for the whole college, with big, great buildings, and Wi-Fi in labs with AC. Also, the college canteen and mess are really good with great food taste, depending on the person's taste. It also has a separate sports ground.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Swami Vivekanand Institute of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 30 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Overall, college is good in terms of fees.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure with playgrounds and a lot of activities, a canteen is available at affordable price, but for medical we have to go out of the college campus. A hospital is present beside the college, Gian Sagar Medical College. Overall, SVIET Punjab offers good infrastructure and supportive facilities for students. While some areas like mess food, can improve. The campus environment, labs, library, and academic support make it a suitable place for learning and growth. Each d...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by ISF College of PharmacyReviewed on 28 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Don't come this far away from home.
reviews.review_text: Labs are good. All apparatus used in industry, like HPLC, HPTLC, UV, etc. Present. Wi-Fi is not working, even though there is no network inside the campus. Classrooms are spacious and digitally updated. There is only one playground. The library is good, and all types of books and magazines are available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Golden Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 22 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A good campus life with decent facilities and helpful staff.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was average but good enough for daily classes. Labs had the basic equipment we needed, and Wi-Fi worked most of the time. Classrooms were clean and comfortable. The library was helpful, but it needed more updated books. Hostel rooms were okay, and the food was manageable. Sports and medical facilities were simple but useful when required.

college_info.college_name: PTU Kapurthala Scholarship Details

paragraphs: The BPharm total tuition fee ranges from INR 2.1 lakh to INR 5 lakh. It is inclusive of fees at the affiliated colleges as well. Moreover, the given fee has been calculated as per the data available from unofficial sources and thus can vary. PTU releases the fee structure for the respective admission years on its official website. The total course fee is higher as that will include exam fees, university funds, security deposit, and other fee elements as well.

Yes, I.K. GPTU does offer some scholarships to its students. The students at the university can apply to the below scholarship at the official website. The candidates must check the eligibility criteria before applying to the same, as the scholarships are offered to the candidates meeting the eligibility requirements. Scholarships offered are:
Candidates can also apply to national-level scholarships offered by the government as the same is also accepted at IKGPTU.

IK Gujral University follows a fee refund policy in case of cancellation of admission. In case a student withdraws his/ her seat before the start of the course, his/ her total fee isrefunded after deduction of INR 1,000 only.

In case a student surrenders his/ her seat after the beginning of the course and before /on last date of admission to that course, he/she get fee with proportionate deduction oftotal monthly fee (full fee including development and other charges) and proportionate total hostel rent (all charges).
In case a student withdraws his /her seat after the last date of admission to that course, he /she does not get any refund.
Parent less students are eligible for financial assistance for full free scholarship of fee, if the
total family income of the student is less than Rs 2.50 Lacs from all source

Father less students / Low Income Group students are eligible for financial assistance for half free ship, if the total family income of the student is less than Rs 2.50 Lacs from all sources. In case the income of concerned is less than Rs 1.20 Lacs then he/she shall be eligible for financial assistance for full free ship. The scholarship can be avail by filling the scholarship form and by submitting ghe required documents.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Barkatullah University Institute of Technology is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering, IT & Software and Science. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech and BCA. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech, M.Sc. and MCA. The fee structure for the Barkatullah University Institute of Technology programmes is around INR 21,200 to 1,96,100.

faqs.answer: A:    Barkatullah University Institute of Technology offers Degree courses including 5 UG and 9 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Barkatullah University Institute of Technology has specializations such as M.Sc. specializations in Chemistry, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Communications Engineering, Information Technology, Materials Science, Nanotechnology, B.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Information Technology.

reviews.review_text: In the department of UIT CSE library, free Wi-Fi, purified water, big and beautiful labs, clean classrooms, very good and beautiful infrastructure of hostel, and government hostel are there with 4500 per annum feels, with free Wi-Fi, hot water, purified water, open gym, proper senior guidance etc. Facilities are there in the hostel of both boys and girls.

reviews.review_heading: Barkatullah University review.
reviews.review_text: Yes, in the online & digital classrooms, Wi-Fi is available for studies. There are libraries available as per the course and its department, with both online and physical books available. I was born and grew up in Bhopal, and I prefer public transport like buses and shared autos for college, which is why I am unable to give feedback on the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: All about Barkatullah University .
reviews.review_text: There is a small building but the whole university is on 400 acres. There are two computer labs with a capacity of 50 students. Wi-Fi facilities are available but they are not working properly. Sports event held every year at the university. There are no medical facilities available.

reviews.review_heading: Overall I had a decent college life here!
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was average for our course. The facilities offered here in the college were of good quality. Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteen, hostel, etc., were available for the students. The hostel facilities were good, with rooms in the hostel having 3 students each. The food in the hostel mess was good to eat.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty of college is good and supportive, placement is not much, infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: Labs, classrooms, library, etc. The hostel is not good because their discipline is very poor. If you take admission, be a day scholar and let the room in rent. Teachers are very supportive, and 50% attendance is necessary in this college. The campus is spread over 400 acres.

reviews.review_heading: Nature of this college is good.
reviews.review_text: In this college, Wi-Fi facilities are very poor. Labs are not so good in condition. Mess food is average in quality. Classrooms and labs are not so good. Less computers are there in labs and they are old school PCs. Wi-Fi is average.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for financially weak students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Classrooms are good and well-maintained. Labs are not good. They do not have good machines. The library is huge and good. The hostel is not good. Seniors do ragging of first-year students. The mess does not provide good food. Students prefer to eat outside food.

reviews.review_heading: A constructive criticism of Barkatullah University.
reviews.review_text: I've heard that the management was far better before COVID, but as per my experience and what I've seen, the infrastructure is very primitive. The library is one place that I believe is okay. Classes are really in a bad situation (there are no smart classes or anything). There is no public or private network for students, the labs are in very poor condition, and the only thing that is proper and good is the sports field.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with all facilities. Each department has its sub-college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Barkatullah University Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college and hostel is good. It was made in 1990. In our hostel, many facilities are available. The rent is less than that of the other rooms. The food is available at a low price. We play many sports.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Engineering College, Ajmer provides Full Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in multiple streams like Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software, and have a fee structure of around INR 98,000 to 1,96,000. UG programs include B.E. / B.Tech. Further, the PG programs include M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA.

faqs.answer: A:    Engineering College, Ajmer is a good institution for M.E./M.Tech, MCA, MBA/PGDM, B.E. / B.Tech courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at Engineering College, Ajmer are Microelectronics, Communications Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Information Technology, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Production Engineering, VLSI Design.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Engineering College, Ajmer.

review_content.Placements: I am pursuing B.Tech in cyber security and my batch is first in this branch. So we are the first to sit in placements in our branch. So let's see the percentage of placements and average package in 2026. But in other branches the placement ratio is above average and approximately 65%-70% of students got placed in good companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and classrooms are good. Labs are advanced and SMART. The library is good and well-mannered. All the books related to the course are available to issue to all the students, and the campus is fully Wi-Fi connected. Hostel by the government is not available for the boys, but for girls, there is a very good hostel where all the girls are taken care of. Boys have to stay outside the campus. There are many PGs and hostels available outside the college campus.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our college are good. Companies like Denso, Meta Cube, and various other well-reputed like L&T come to hire students. The roles offered by them are GET (Graduate Engineering Trainee), and some offer roles as per their criteria.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostels as of now only available for girls. Labs are highly maintained, with advanced technology and computers in a good environment. Wi-Fi is also provided by the college. Classrooms are well-maintained and clean. There is a positive environment for studies.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: GEC Ajmer: Think twice before admission.

content.Placements: My college's mechanical engineering has the most placements in comparison to any other branch in the college, which means mechanical engineering is the best branch here overall. Almost 60 students got placed this year, and most of them in the Adani company, so you can consider mechanical engineering in this college.
content.Infrastructure: Our department has good classrooms, Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, and a rich library. Facilities are decent with clean rooms, 24/7 water, and Wi-Fi. Mess food is okay. The canteen is better. Basic medical aid is available. Sports facilities also include volleyball.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good college at this fee.

content.Placements: Placement for core branches is quite strong, especially for mechanical, although the tech branch is still decent. If you have the right skills, you can secure good off-campus placements. Companies like Adani have recruited students from core branches. Placement could be better.
content.Infrastructure: For the tech branch college, computer labs with Wi-Fi and AC rooms are available. There are proper labs for them. College has a seminar room. In the core branch, there are separate labs for students for every subject. College has a library with Wi-Fi available in it, and you can issue books from it.

individual_reviews.title: Review of Engineering College, Ajmer.

So let's see the percentage of placements and average package in 2026. But in other branches the placement ratio is above average and approximately 65%-70% of students got placed in good companies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and classrooms are good. Labs are advanced and SMART. The library is good and well-mannered. All the books related to the course are available to issue to all the students, and the campus is fully Wi-Fi connected. Hostel by the government is not available for the boys, but for girls, there is a very good hostel where all the girls are taken care of. Boys have to stay outside the campus. There are many PGs and hostels available outside the college campus.

individual_reviews.title: The college is good and now transformed into an RIT, equivalent to NIT, by Rajasthan government.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are good. Companies like Denso, Meta Cube, and various other well-reputed like L&T come to hire students. The roles offered by them are GET (Graduate Engineering Trainee), and some offer roles as per their criteria.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels as of now only available for girls. Labs are highly maintained, with advanced technology and computers in a good environment. Wi-Fi is also provided by the college. Classrooms are well-maintained and clean. There is a positive environment for studies.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Our college is quite good enough.

content.Placements: Currently, I'm not aware of placements, but yes I have asked my seniors for that and the answers are quite disappointing because the placements and not so good in my courses. Placements are very good in branches like mechanical, civil, EE, and ECE. The percentage of students got internships is around 60%, and the students have done very well. One of the main reasons behind low placement is students have a family pressure of doing government job rather than in the private sector. Top recruiting companies are TCS and Wipro.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very good according to the government college. There is Wi-Fi available in very building. Currently hostel facilities are available for girls only but soon the college is deciding to build the hostel for boys as well. Mess good is 3/5, not so good. Canteen is nice, small but the taste is very good. Sports and games facilities are quite decent. Games like volleyball, football, cricket, table tennis, basketball, and some other sports are also available.

reviews.review_heading: GEC Ajmer: Think twice before admission.
reviews.review_text: Our department has good classrooms, Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, and a rich library. Facilities are decent with clean rooms, 24/7 water, and Wi-Fi. Mess food is okay. The canteen is better. Basic medical aid is available. Sports facilities also include volleyball.

reviews.review_heading: Good college at this fee.
reviews.review_text: For the tech branch college, computer labs with Wi-Fi and AC rooms are available. There are proper labs for them. College has a seminar room. In the core branch, there are separate labs for students for every subject. College has a library with Wi-Fi available in it, and you can issue books from it.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Engineering College, Ajmer.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and classrooms are good. Labs are advanced and SMART. The library is good and well-mannered. All the books related to the course are available to issue to all the students, and the campus is fully Wi-Fi connected. Hostel by the government is not available for the boys, but for girls, there is a very good hostel where all the girls are taken care of. Boys have to stay outside the campus. There are many PGs and hostels available outside the college campus.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good and now transformed into an RIT, equivalent to NIT, by Rajasthan government.
reviews.review_text: Hostels as of now only available for girls. Labs are highly maintained, with advanced technology and computers in a good environment. Wi-Fi is also provided by the college. Classrooms are well-maintained and clean. There is a positive environment for studies.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is quite good enough.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good according to the government college. There is Wi-Fi available in very building. Currently hostel facilities are available for girls only but soon the college is deciding to build the hostel for boys as well. Mess good is 3/5, not so good. Canteen is nice, small but the taste is very good. Sports and games facilities are quite decent. Games like volleyball, football, cricket, table tennis, basketball, and some other sports are also available.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very good. Students can choose this if they want to pursue engineering.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very good. Buildings are very beautiful. There is a canteen, parking facility, etc. There are grounds for students to play. The college organises Combat which is a sports tournament for each student and branch.

reviews.review_heading: The college is average with average facilities. Placements are also average here.
reviews.review_text: There is no hostel in the college. A large amount of cost-effective hostels and PGS are available outside the college. The total cost of living in Ajmer is affordable to all. Classrooms are neat and clean. High-speed unlimited Wi-Fi is available to all students on the campus. Labs are proper with all the resources and required equipment. It is a spacious college covering about 100 acres with a nice surrounding environment. Labs are well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: The overall review of this college is good and value for money. The faculty is good and humble.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. All facilities are available. Modern equipment is provided. CCTVs are there for security purposes. I am studying computer science as I love this branch. The teaching quality is high with even teacher putting in their best efforts. Campus life is good. A hostel is not provided by the college for boys. It is safe. There are things for emergencies.

reviews.review_heading: Decent experience, struggled with placements, budget-friendly.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in the college. There are large classrooms that are well-equipped with modern-day technology. The library is equipped with useful books and magazines. Hostels are only available for girls, which is inside the college campus. Food is average. Sports are Kabaddi and cricket, and there is a volleyball court. There is no cricket ground.

reviews.review_heading: Waiting for my best, and my opinion is don’t depend on this college from the start.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is good, not so bad, but the glasses are broken and some tables and chairs are dusty. The college network is strong, but only for the Jio network, and somewhere at the backside of the college, there is no network for any other. Now talking about the mess and hostel, this college doesn’t have a hostel and mess for boys; they have a hostel and mess for girls only, so I have to live in a nearby PG.

reviews.review_heading: My college journey in Engineering College Ajmer.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is kind of good. It has a land space of 300 acres, but only 50 acres of land is utilized for now. There are 3 big campus buildings for classes and labs, with a central courtyard, a separate building for the mechanical workshop, 13 girls’ hostels, and a separate library building, which is a good thing here. The college also has a guest house and sports facilities built in a different building, but there is no amphitheater for stage programs. The sports playground...

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, faculty members are good, and placements are average.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is good, although the main building is old but well-maintained. Campus is fully Wi-Fi-enabled, but the speed is not too good. Labs have enough equipment, the library is good, and the classrooms are equipped with digital boards. Sports facilities are not good in the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent college in manner of quality education, fee structure, and placement percentage.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is very developed and advanced, in which free Wi-Fi is available to students and faculty. They can access Wi-Fi through the college ERP ID password. The labs of the mechanical department are fully advanced. All the precautions and safety measures are considered when going into the labs. Advanced lathe and computer numerical control machines are installed, and smart board classrooms are there. Coming to the library, the college has a fully furnished and air-conditioned ...

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is Good, overall college is nice, but placements are not satisfying.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are overall good. Wi-Fi is available, and the library is there to issue curriculum books. Hostel facility is also there, but for girls only, and that too reserved for SC/ST category. Canteen and medical facilities are also decent. Overall, the facility and infrastructure are decent.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement and good infrastructure, and facilities are also good.
reviews.review_text: Library available. Wi-Fi available. Canteen. Top classrooms. Mess food quality is best. Cricket ground. Volleyball ground. Basketball court. Mess food is good, but sometimes the food quality is low. Canteen is available, but there are limitations on it.
