college_info.intro:
Swami Devi Dyal Group of Professional Institutions' popular programmes are BTech, BEd, and MBA. The BTech course at Swami Devi Dyal Group of Professional Institutions is offered through its institute established in 2001, namely SDDIET. The institute is ISO-certified. SDDIET's BTech is provided in five specialisations with a total seat intake of 450. There is also a lateral entry option available for BTech. BTech is an AICTE-recognised course. BTech Civil Engineering students get placement in Central and State Governments. These students can work in Military Engineering Services, Border Road Organization, Pubic Health, Irrigation, and various other fields. For easy learning, the Department of Computer Science and Engineering has good computing facilities such as a Robotic Lab, Artificial Intelligence System, Machine Learning Lab, Cyber Security, and others.
Swami Devi Dyal Group of Professional Institutions' MBA is offered through the College of Management Studies. The total seat intake for MBA is 60. Swami Devi Dyal College Panchkula arranges training programmes for MBA students to boost their skills and knowledge. Overall, Swami Devi Dyal Group of Professional Institutions' students have a great future ahead with multiple opportunities lined up for them. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Swami Devi Dyal Group of Professional Institutions and their respective eligibility and Swami Devi Dyal Group of Professional Institutions fees:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Candidates must take part in the Swami Devi Dyal Group of Professional Institutions admission process as soon as the admission window opens. At the UG level, the college offers four-year BTech, three-year , five-year , and various other courses to students. At the PG level, the college offers a two-year MBA, three-year , and various other courses to students. BTech is provided in five specialisations, namely Computer Science and Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and Electronic & Communication Engineering. Below mentioned are some of the and their respective eligibility and Swami Devi Dyal Group of Professional Institutions fee structure:

faqs.answer: A:    At the undergraduate level, Swami Devi Dyal Group of Professional Institutions offers BTech and various other courses for students. The total fee for the BTech is INR 2 Lacs - INR 2.2 lakh. The total fee for the M.Tech course INR 1 lakh. The fee keeps changing from year to year. Hence, visit the official website for the latest update
faqs.question: What is the fee for various courses at the Swami Devi Dyal Group of Professional Institutions?

faqs.answer: A:    No, to pursue the DPharm programme at Swami Devi Dyal Group of Professional Institutions (SDDGPI), candidates must have completed Class 12 with a Science background. The required subjects include Physics, Chemistry, and either Biology or Mathematics. Consequently, as a Commerce student, you do not meet the eligibility criteria for DPharm admission. This is because the programme necessitates a foundation in the necessary Science subjects, which are not covered in the Commerce stream. Therefore, without the required Science background, you would not be eligible to apply for the DPharm programme at SDDGPI.
faqs.question: I'm a Commerce student. Can I pursue a DPharma at SDDGPI after completing Class 12?

faqs.answer: A:    To apply for the DPharm programme at Swami Devi Dyal Group of Professional Institutions, candidates must submit several important documents. These documents are essential for verifying the candidate’s eligibility and ensuring a smooth admission process. The required documents include:Original documents and three sets of photocopies of:Class 10 and 12 mark sheetsTransfer certificateMigration certificateCharacter certificateCaste certificateBonafide/domicile certificateAadhar Card photocopyRecent passport-size photos of the candidate (5)Medical fitness certificate duly verified by a medical officeThese documents are necessary to confirm the candidate’s academic qualifications, identity, residency status, and overall eligibility for the programme. The mark sheets and certificates establish the academic credentials, while the transfer, migration, and character certificates ensure the candidates' good standing from previous institutions.
faqs.question: What are the important documents that candidates required for applying in DPharm course at SDDGPI?

faqs.answer: A:    After registering on the college website's portal, candidates will receive a link sent to the email address they provided during registration. After, receiving the email, candidates should click on the link, which will redirect them to the payment page. On the payment page, they will have the option to pay the SDDGPI DPharm application fee, which is INR 1,000. It is important for candidates to ensure that the email address they provide is correct and regularly checked, as this link is essential for completing the application process. Once the payment is successfully made, candidates will receive a confirmation of their payment and the application will be processed further.

individual_reviews.title: Our college offers different types of courses which are not available locally.

content.Placements: Our college does not specify any minimum package. I am a fresher, so I don't know how much packages are offered to graduates. B.A. LL.B. is very popular in our college, and the teachers are also educated and helpful.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has a moot court, a big library, and neat, clean classrooms with functional electric devices. The college offers a good hostel, and it also has a gym for hostel students. There is a large canteen and a big campus. The college organizes tournaments for students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good facilities are available here.

content.Placements: Around 75% to 80% of students from our batch got placed. The highest package is around 13 LPA. The lowest package is around 3.4 LPA. The top placement companies offered are Apollo Fortis and AIMS. Many students also got valuable internships.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for our course is quite good with well-equipped classrooms, access to Wi-Fi, computer labs, and well-stocked library. The hostel facilities are well-maintained, 24/7 water and electricity facilities are available. The food in the mess is decent and quite okay.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The campus is very neat and clean. The environment of the college is very attractive.

content.Placements: Almost all students got nice placements and internships. The highest package is 12 LPA and the lowest package is 8 LPA. The top recruiting companies in our college are Love Dental, Max, and Apollo. 80% of students got internships in Love Dental and the rest of others in Apollo and Max.
content.Infrastructure: The campus infrastructure is quite good. Classrooms are clean and equipped with projectors and whiteboards. Wi-Fi is available in academic areas and hostels. Labs are updated regularly and provide hands-on experience. The library is spacious and well-stocked with books. The college provides good basic facilities. Classrooms are well-maintained, and labs have most of the equipment needed. Wi-Fi is mostly reliable. The library is decent. Hostel rooms are average but livable. The mess food is okay, and nutritious but not always tasty. The canteen helps when we need a change. Medical help is available 24x7.

admission_overview.college_name: Swami Devi Dyal Group of Professional Institutions Admission 2025: Courses, Fee, Eligibility and Selection

admission_process.title: Swami Devi Dyal Group of Professional Institutions Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Swami Devi Dyal College Admission 2025is open. The college offers M.Tech, B.Tech, MDS, BDS, MBA, BBA, and many other courses.Swami Devi Dyal Group of Professional Institutionsoffers around 16 courses specialised in Engineering, Computer Science, Management, Dental Sciences, Pharmacy, Nursing and Education. Swami Devi Dyal College offers both merit and entrance-based admission. The candidates willing to get admission to the college can apply online through the official website of the college. Check the below article to know more about Swami Devi Dyal College admission, course-wise eligibility criteria, fee, seat intake and admission process:

Swami Devi Dyal College admissions 2025are ongoing for all the courses. The college accepts scores of state and national-level entrance exams, such as NEET, CAT, JEE Main and others for admission to UG and PG courses. For a few courses, however, admission is subject to scores obtained by the candidates in the previous qualifying exam. Below table contains Swami Devi Dyal College Admission Highlights 2025:
Particulars
Swami Devi Dyal College Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
16+ courses across multiple specialisations
Admission Status
How to apply?
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

Admission to all the courses offered by Swami Devi Dyal College is subject to merit in the entrance exam, selection rounds, and past academics. Students need to provide valid score obtained in the relevant entrance exam, such as CMAT/ MAT, etc. Additionally,CET by Pt. Bhagwat Dayal Sharma University, Rohtakis also accepted for certain courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection criteria for all programmes:
Steps for Swami Devi Dyal Group of Professional Institutions Admission Process 2025

The admission process for Swami Devi Dyal College is a multi-step process inclusive of application, appearance in the selection rounds, offline admission process, and document verification. A step-by-step process that students need to follow is as follows:
STEP 1: Swami Devi Dyal College Application Process 2025

The application process for all programmes at Swami Devi Dyal College is done online. Candidates can fill out the Swami Devi Dyal College application form 2025 on the official website for the respective course accepting exam as given above. The registration fee for all programmes varies as per the counselling bodies & official website of Swami Devi Dyal College.
STEP 2: Swami Devi Dyal College Selection Process 2025

Candidates who've applied for any course at Swami Devi Dyal College must appear for the entrance exam or qualifying exam as per the respective course. After qualifying the minimum eligibility criteria. The candidates are shortlisted based on the various entrance exam scores accepted by the college including JEE, NEET, CAT, MAT and others.
STEP 3: Swami Devi Dyal College Document Verification & Payment of Admission Fee

Candidates shortlisted after qualifying for the eligibility & selection process will have to submit the prescribed admission fee for the particular course. Following this, candidates are required to go through the document verification and are intimated about the date of commencement of the classes.

faqs.answer: No, to pursue the DPharm programme at Swami Devi Dyal Group of Professional Institutions (SDDGPI), candidates must have completed Class 12 with a Science background. The required subjects include Physics, Chemistry, and either Biology or Mathematics. Consequently, as a Commerce student, you do not meet the eligibility criteria for DPharm admission. This is because the programme necessitates a foundation in the necessary Science subjects, which are not covered in the Commerce stream. Therefore, w

faqs.question: Can I take direct admission at SDDGPI for DPharm course?
faqs.answer: Admission to DPharm at SDDGPI is based on merit, determined by Class 12 scores followed by HSTES counselling. The college will release a merit/rank prepared on the basis of last qualifying examination through on/off campus counselling by Haryana State Technical Education Society (HSTES). However, direct admission to DPharm course at Swami Devi Dyal Group of Professional Institution is not clearly mentioned on official website of college.

faqs.question: Can someone get admission to BPharm course at SDDGPI, after Class 12 in non medical stream?
faqs.answer: Yes, a candidate can pursue a Bachelor of Pharmacy (BPharm) course at SDDGPI after completing Class 12 in a non-medical stream. The only prefernece that college considers is that candidate must have completed Class 12 with at least an aggregate of 45%. placement_data.title: Swami Devi Dyal Group of Professional Institutions Placement overview
paragraphs: What’s new at Swami Devi Dayal Group of Professional Studies Placements 2023? The Institute has not released the placement report for the year 2023. However, as per placement statistics 2022, Swami Devi Dayal College has released the placement data for BTech Institute of Engineering and Technology, Pharmacy , Management , College of Nursing and College of Education.
Students can find school-wise highest package offered during Swami Devi Dayal College placements 2023 from the following points mentioned below:
Many top companies visited the campus during placements 2022 such as L&T, Chegg India, TVS, Dr. Reddy's Laboratories, Axis Bank among others.
Swami Devi Dayal Group of Professional Studies Final Placements 2022

faqs.question: How are placements for DPharm programme at SDDGPI?
faqs.answer: Based on the reviews of alumni on Shiksha, here is the information about the placements of SDDGPI for the DPharm programme: Review 1: Placements for the DPharm programme at Swami Devi Dyal Group of Professional Institutions (SDDGPI) are generally positive. Students who graduate with a first division often secure placements. Top companies like Cipla and GSK recruit studnets. The highest salary package offered is around INR 1 Lacs per month, while medium-sized companies offer between INR 20,000 and INR 30,000 per month. Reveiw 2: Many students from the programme also secure internships in various pharmaceutical industries, gaining practical experience and enhancing their employability. The roles offered typically focus on management and marketing within the pharmaceutical field. Overall, while the placement packages can vary, the opportunities provided are valuable for students looking to build their careers in the pharmaceutical sector. Conclusively, placements for the DPharm programme at SDDGPI are generally decent, with companies like Cipla and GSK offering decent salaries to high-performing students. However, salary packages vary widely, and opportunities are particularly strong in management and marketing roles. Internships are providing valuable industry experience. Note: These insights might not fully represent the experience of the entire batch of DPharm course. Due to varying outcomes and opportunities, students are advised to conduct their own research to get a clear understanding of the placement scenario.

faqs.question: Which companies visit SDDGPI for BPharm placements?
faqs.answer: Several prominent companies visit SDDGPI for BPharm placements, including leading pharmaceutical firms, biotechnology companies, healthcare organisations, and research institutions. Some of them are: Alembic Glaxo Smith Cline (gsk) Glenmark Sun Pharma Cipla Astra Zeneca and others.

description: Swami Devi Dyal Group of Professional Institutions cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Swami Devi Dyal Group of Professional Institutions cutoff 2025 was released via HSTES entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff was 1058427 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 1058427.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

Swami Devi Dyal Group of Professional Institutions NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the BDS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 301491 for BDS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.
Swami Devi Dyal Group of Professional Institutions BDS cutoff 2025 was 301491 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Swami Devi Dyal Group of Professional Institutions accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the BDS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

reviews.review_heading: Our college offers different types of courses which are not available locally.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a moot court, a big library, and neat, clean classrooms with functional electric devices. The college offers a good hostel, and it also has a gym for hostel students. There is a large canteen and a big campus. The college organizes tournaments for students.

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities are available here.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for our course is quite good with well-equipped classrooms, access to Wi-Fi, computer labs, and well-stocked library. The hostel facilities are well-maintained, 24/7 water and electricity facilities are available. The food in the mess is decent and quite okay.

reviews.review_heading: My college is great of all times and I love my college. We have a lot of greenery.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are too good. Inside the college, they behave like teachers, outside the college, they behave like parents. Somehow, the infrastructure was also upgraded after COVID. The food is average. Wi-Fi is not available, but it will come soon. The rest of the things are also improving.

reviews.review_heading: Recommending this college for admission.
reviews.review_text: The college has a well-planned and modern infrastructure. Classrooms are equipped with smart boards and laboratories are fully functional with the latest technologies. The library is rich in resources and the campus is clean and green. Facilities like the canteen and auditorium add to overall student experience.

reviews.review_heading: The campus is very neat and clean. The environment of the college is very attractive.
reviews.review_text: The campus infrastructure is quite good. Classrooms are clean and equipped with projectors and whiteboards. Wi-Fi is available in academic areas and hostels. Labs are updated regularly and provide hands-on experience. The library is spacious and well-stocked with books. The college provides good basic facilities. Classrooms are well-maintained, and labs have most of the equipment needed. Wi-Fi is mostly reliable. The library is decent. Hostel rooms are average but livable. The mess food is okay,...

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty, nice infrastructure, and upgraded hostel facilities.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is getting better than before The college boasts modern classrooms equipped with projectors and smart boards, well air furnished laboratories, and classrooms. There are separate hostels for girls and boys facilities are upgraded. The hostels are well-secured.

reviews.review_heading: It typically highlights strong academics, supportive faculty, and good environment in this college.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are available for both girls and boys with good food and cleanliness. Some students describe the hostels as homes with hygiene. About food facilities, students have mixed opinions about food some say it is good and some say it is not good.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for studying an MS course.
reviews.review_text: The hostels are average and offer various types of accommodations: single rooms without AC, single rooms with AC, sharing rooms without AC, and sharing rooms with AC. It depends on what you want; however, there is no Wi-Fi available, and the rooms don’t have attached washrooms. The mess is acceptable, the classrooms are good, and the infrastructure is solid.

reviews.review_heading: I am highly satisfied to be part of this institution.
reviews.review_text: Good quality rooms are available, with options for both AC and non-AC rooms, and various sports activities can be enjoyed on campus. Overall, there are excellent opportunities for mental and physical development. The weather is pleasant for living on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of our college are very good. We have Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library for our comfort and ease of study. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is good, including Wi-Fi and food.

reviews.review_heading: This college looks like a heaven.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of a BDS (Bachelor of Dental Surgery) program typically includes modern dental clinics, well-equipped laboratories, spacious lecture halls, a comprehensive library, and potential a hospital or clinic for practical experience. The quality of these facilities is crucial for providing students with the necessary tools and environment for a successful education.

reviews.review_heading: As a first-year BDS student, I am very satisfied with my college and teaching staff.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and the infrastructure available for our course are good. Classrooms are clean and equipped with projectors for lectures. Labs like the dissection hall and the histology lab have all the necessary instruments and models. The library is peaceful and has the required textbooks. The campus is neat, and the parks are also neat to sit in the breaks.

reviews.review_heading: Admission to this college was a good decision.
reviews.review_text: The building is beautiful with greenery and a nice environment. Infrastructure is nice. The hospital has a good number of beds and a dental chair. We have the latest technology installed. Classrooms are quite large and properly ventilated. Campus makes you feel safe.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with teachers and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Focuses on networks, systems and devices to ensure they are properly configured and secure. Evaluates the quality and condition of physical infrastructure like buildings, roads, and utilities. This assesses the security posture of an organization’s infrastructure, identifies vulnerabilities, and recommends improvements. Smart classrooms with proper infrastructure are required for students. Their service is marked by efficiency and punctuality.

reviews.review_heading: Good for life and future.
reviews.review_text: Rooms should be neat and clean, there is a personal bed and an almirah. No any ragging is taken, all kind of food are available in the canteen and every type of medical facilities are there for students. Sports and games facilities are also good.

college_info.intro:
DMIHER popular programmes are BSc and BTech. BSc and BTech students are placed in top companies such as IBM, PUMA, TCS, HDFC, ICICI, Axis Bank, HDB Finance, Shriram Finance, Wipro, Amazon, and others. The USPs of joining the popular programmes at DMIHER are mentioned below:
DMIHER students are taught in such a manner to prepare them as future leaders. Overall, DMIHER is one of the top universities offering quality education to students. Below mentioned are some of the DMIHER courses and their respective eligibility and DMIHER fee structure:

faqs.answer: A:    DMIHER has collaborated with various companies, colleges, and organisations. DMIHER has signed MoUs with various institutes and organisations. The below-mentioned are Datta Meghe Institute of Higher Education & Research collaborations:DMIHER CollaborationsAssociation for Medical Education in Europe (AMEE), EuropeJohn Hopkins University, USAMAHSA University, MalaysiaVanderbilt University, USARekhi Foundation, California, USAUniversity of Sydney, Sydney
faqs.question: Has Datta Meghe Institute of Higher Education and Research collaborated with any college or university?

faqs.answer: A:     As per the NIRF 2025, the institute ranked #84 under Overall category, #49 under University, #20 under Medical, and #36 under Dental. 450 UG and 268 PG students were placed during DMIHER placements. The median package offered to UG students was between INR 4.20 LPA and INR 10.80 LPA. For PG courses median package ranged between INR 12.24 LPA and INR 14.40 LPA.
faqs.question: How are the placements in Datta Meghe Institute of Higher Education and Research for BSc?

faqs.answer: A:    The latest reports on MSc placements for DMIHER are yet to be released. Refer to the median package 2021 from the table below:DMIHER Placements 2021: MedicalCourseMedian PackageMScINR 20.40 LPA
faqs.question: What is the placement record of previous year in Datta Meghe Institute of Higher Education and Research?

faqs.answer: A:    Admission to all Datta Meghe Institute of Higher Education and Research courses is entrance-based. Applicants selection is based on score in entrance exam Eligible candidates can register online by visiting the official website of the institute. The following table mentions the eligibility criteria for all the courses:CourseEligibilityBSc (Nursing)Class 10 and Class 12 with 45% aggregate (40% for reserved category)from a recognised boardMScGraduation degree from a recognised boardBPharmaClass 10 and Class 12 with 45% aggregate from a recognised boardBBAClass 10 and Class 12 from a recognised boardMBAPass a degree of minimum three years with 50% aggregate (45% for reserved category)Pharm DClass 10 and Class 12 or Diploma in Pharmacy
faqs.question: How much percentage is required for DMIHER?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, DMIHER accepts the JEE main entrance examination for admission to BTech programme.Datta Meghe Institute of Higher Education and Research offers a four-year BTech programme at the undergraduate level. Students who fulfill the minimum eligibility criteria and have a valid score on the JEE Main/MHT CET examination can apply for admission.
faqs.question: Does Datta Meghe Institute of Higher Education and Research accept JEE Mains score for admission?

faqs.answer: A:    Datta Meghe Institute of Higher Education and Research offers MBBS programmes at undergraduate level. he admission is based on a valid score in the NEET entrance examination. The number of seats available for MBBS programme is *400. Eligible candidates can register for NEET exam and apply for admission on the official website of the institute.Note: The above seats information is taken from the *official website, and subject to change.
faqs.question: How many seats are available for MBBS at Datta Meghe Institute of Higher Education & Research?

faqs.answer: A:    DMIHER MBA is a 2-year PG course offered to 900+ students. The general MBA programme offered by DMIHER includes various specializations. Students must have a minimum percentage in Bachelor's Degree in any discipline to be eligible for admission. Students may have to sit for entrance exams at the national or university level, such as CAT, MAT, or XAT. The DMIHER MBA website lists a team of qualified and experienced faculty members. The website also mentions that DMIHER places a lot of emphasis on placements, with pre-placement training, and an industry interaction programme to help students get ready for jobs. You can get more information about the DMIHER MBA course curriculum by calling the admission office.
faqs.question: How many students can do MBA at Datta Meghe Institute of Higher Education and Research?

reviews_list.review_title: Well-equipped medical college with strong hospital exposure

review_content.Placements: In the MBBS course, placements aren't structured like in engineering; it's more about internships and residency. Around 80-90% of students secure internships, primarily in attached or government hospitals. Top recruiters include Datta Meghe Medical College & Hospital and various private clinics. Internship roles are typically as junior doctors or interns. There isn't a clear package system like with other degrees, but some students do secure residency offers abroad or in reputed Indian hospitals.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is well-developed, featuring modern labs, advanced equipment, and a library with access to medical journals. Classrooms are air-conditioned and equipped with smart boards. Hostel facilities are good, offering Wi-Fi, clean rooms, medical support, and a healthy mess menu. Sports facilities like a basketball court, gym, and a common recreation room are available. The campus is green and spacious.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: A great campus life, good placements, and well-developed infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Mainly 85% of students got placed in my course. The highest package offered can vary from 1-1.5 lacs per month. The lowest package can be Rs. 60,000-80,000 per month. Our college has many top recruiting companies like Lenskart, pharmaceutical companies, and many hospitals all around the world. They offer many placements. Many students from my course got placed in hospitals like Dr Patil Hospital Mumbai, AIIMS Nagpur, Government Medical College Nagpur, and so on. There are many top roles offered in our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very great. All the machine equipment and laboratories are very well-managed and hygienic. The hostel has many facilities like airconditioners, a study area, a dining area, a garden and many more. The lunch of mess and canteen taste so good just like our home. All medical facilities are available. There are more activities like cricket football, volleyball and many more.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Medical Laboratory Technology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college and I got knowledge about the laboratory field.

review_content.Placements: I got an internship at Max Healthcare Hospital Vaishali I learned all the machines and how to use them and learned technical skills. They provide knowledge and perform various kinds of tests on the machines. The highest salary offered is Rs. 50,000 per month. The lowest salary offered is Rs. 10,000 - Rs. 50,000.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides good facilities and great teaching methods. Classrooms are good and labs are also available for practical classes. Projectors are available in all classrooms. All facilities are available in our classrooms. The hostel facility is available. They provide food.

faqs.answer: Datta Meghe Institute of Higher Education and Research admissions are ongoing for all courses on its official website. The university offers entrance-based admission to all UG, PG and Diploma courses. Candidates searching for admission to Datta Meghe Institute of Higher Education and Research are required to fill out the online application form. Candidates can fill out the admission form by visiting the official website of DMIHER.
faqs.question: Q: Can I apply for DMIHER admission?

faqs.answer: Datta Meghe Institute of Higher Education & Research [DMIHER Wardha] offers various courses such as BSc, BPT, BDS, MBBS etc. Candidates can apply online on the official website of the college. Admission to the courses is both merit and entrance-based. Admission to MBBS is based on a valid score in NEET entrance examination. Courses such as MSc requires to have a valid performance in the last qualfying exam (merit-based).
faqs.question: Q: How can I get admission in Datta Meghe Institute of Higher Education & Research?

faqs.answer: Yes, DMIHER is a good university. Datta Meghe Institute of Higher Education and Research (DMIHER), earlier known as Datta Meghe Institute of Medical Sciences (DMIMS), is ranked 71st under the Overall category, 42nd under the University category, and 24th under the Dental category by NIRF 2024. DMIHER is accredited with A+ Grade by NAAC and has NABH and NABL-accredited laboratories. This deemed to be university is ISO certified.

overview_faqs.question: Is DMIHER good university?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, DMIHER is a good university. Datta Meghe Institute of Higher Education and Research (DMIHER), earlier known as Datta Meghe Institute of Medical Sciences (DMIMS), is ranked 71st under the Overall category, 42nd under the University category, and 24th under the Dental category by NIRF 2024. DMIHER is accredited with A+ Grade by NAAC and has NABH and NABL-accredited laboratories. This deemed to be university is ISO certified.

overview_faqs.question: Is pursuing MBA at Datta Meghe Institute of Higher Education and Research expensive?
overview_faqs.answer: DMIHER Online’s courses are relatively affordable. The MBA programme is offered by DMIMS through its affiliated institute Datta Meghe Institute of Higher Education and Research (DMIHER), which is available online. The fee for the MBA will be around Rs. 2,20,000 per annum, which is low compared to other colleges in the vicinity. The college may also charge a registration fee of Rs. 5,000. The fee for the MBA only includes the tuition fees. The college may charge additional fees for hostel, examination, placement, etc. Contact the admissions office of DMIHER to find out about the availability and fees of on-campus MBA programs. It would be better to research the MBA programme fees of other universities in your vicinity or in your preferred location.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees for MCA at Datta Meghe Institute of Higher Education and Research?
overview_faqs.answer: Datta Meghe Institute of Higher Education and Research MCA fee is about 90,000 annually and for 2 years it is about 1,80,000. DMIHER's on-campus MCA fee is not available on its official website. You can contact the admissions office for more information. You should have a bachelor's degree in computer Science or computer applications with a minimum of 50% marks and should have Maths in 12th grade. The programme focuses on the development and implementation of practical information system applications and provides a basic grounding in the fundamentals of computer science. Email or phone the admissions office for the latest information on MCA on campus and MCA fees.

review_summary.college_name: DMIHER Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Honestly, the college is excellent, you should really prefer this college as your top priority.

content.Placements: 100% students are placed. The highest package offered is 4.8 LPA, the lowest 2.3 LPA, and the Average 3.8LPA. Top recruiters are Sun Pharma, Dr. Reddy, and Cipla 100% got internships and great placements. They provide the top roles in industrial and other companies for your experience. You should really prefer these college.
content.Infrastructure: Datta Meghe of the College of Pharmacy has great facilities and infrastructure. They provide Wi-Fi and library access to all students. Hostel has a great environment and a chill area. The mess is very clean, and they maintain hygiene. Overall, the college is best for your career.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: My honest review of my college.

content.Placements: Around 50% of students got placed in the course. The highest package is 17 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA. Companies that visit the campus are Deloitte, Wipro, TCS, Adani Group, etc. The college offers good placement opportunities for students interested in getting themselves employed.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides hostel facilities in collaboration with the PG hostel. My hostel fee is 2.10 lakhs, 1.8 lakhs for rent, and Rs. 30,000 for amenities for non-AC, and for AC, it is extra. Mess charge for me is Rs. 42,000. Rooms are on a double-sharing basis. Good food is provided. We have good facilities here.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Well-equipped medical college with strong hospital exposure

content.Placements: In the MBBS course, placements aren't structured like in engineering; it's more about internships and residency. Around 80-90% of students secure internships, primarily in attached or government hospitals. Top recruiters include Datta Meghe Medical College & Hospital and various private clinics. Internship roles are typically as junior doctors or interns. There isn't a clear package system like with other degrees, but some students do secure residency offers abroad or in reputed Indian hospitals.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is well-developed, featuring modern labs, advanced equipment, and a library with access to medical journals. Classrooms are air-conditioned and equipped with smart boards. Hostel facilities are good, offering Wi-Fi, clean rooms, medical support, and a healthy mess menu. Sports facilities like a basketball court, gym, and a common recreation room are available. The campus is green and spacious.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: A great campus life, good placements, and well-developed infrastructure.

content.Placements: Mainly 85% of students got placed in my course. The highest package offered can vary from 1-1.5 lacs per month. The lowest package can be Rs. 60,000-80,000 per month. Our college has many top recruiting companies like Lenskart, pharmaceutical companies, and many hospitals all around the world. They offer many placements. Many students from my course got placed in hospitals like Dr Patil Hospital Mumbai, AIIMS Nagpur, Government Medical College Nagpur, and so on. There are many top roles offered in our college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very great. All the machine equipment and laboratories are very well-managed and hygienic. The hostel has many facilities like airconditioners, a study area, a dining area, a garden and many more. The lunch of mess and canteen taste so good just like our home. All medical facilities are available. There are more activities like cricket football, volleyball and many more.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Medical Laboratory Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college and I got knowledge about the laboratory field.

content.Placements: I got an internship at Max Healthcare Hospital Vaishali I learned all the machines and how to use them and learned technical skills. They provide knowledge and perform various kinds of tests on the machines. The highest salary offered is Rs. 50,000 per month. The lowest salary offered is Rs. 10,000 - Rs. 50,000.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides good facilities and great teaching methods. Classrooms are good and labs are also available for practical classes. Projectors are available in all classrooms. All facilities are available in our classrooms. The hostel facility is available. They provide food.

admission_overview.college_name: DMIHER Admission 2025: Courses, Fees, Eligibility & Selection Process

admission_process.title: DMIHER Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: DMIHER admission 2025 is currently ongoing on the official website of the university. The university offers various courses, such as BTech, BSc, MSc, BBA, MBA and many others under various schools, including Allied Science, Nursing, Engineering and Technology and many others. Candidates are required to meet the eligibility criteria set by the university to be eligible for admission. Candidates get entrance-based admission to all UG, PG and diploma courses.DMIHERcarries out the application process in both online and offline modes. Read the following article to get a detailed breakdown of Datta Meghe Institute of Higher Education & Research admission, course eligibility, selection criteria and admission process:

Datta Meghe Institute of Higher Education & Research admission to all its courses is both merit and entrance-based. Applicants can register for admission at the college by visiting their website. Check the table below to know more about Datta Meghe Institute of Higher Education & Research course eligibility and selection criteria:
Eligibility

Check here for more details aboutDatta Meghe Institute of Higher Education & Research courses

Datta Meghe Institute of Higher Education & Research admission process 2025 has begun for all courses. The university offers entrance-based admission to all the courses. Candidates are required to fulfil the admission process of DMIHER for admission. Check below the DMIHER admission process 2025:
Step 1:Application Process 2025
Candidates searching for admission to DMIHER in any course are required to apply on the official website of DMIHER .
Step 2: Selection Rounds

DMIHER admission is entrance-based for all the courses. The university offers various national-level and state-level entrance exam scores for admission to its UG, PG and diploma courses. Additionaly. Candidates are required to fill out the eligibility criteria i.e., pass Class 12 for admission to UG courses, pass UG degree for admission to PG courses.
Step 3: Final Seat Allotment/Fee Submission

DMIHER releases the merit list based on the scores in qualifying entrance exams. Candidates who get shortlisted in the selection round are required to submit a certain amount of fee to lock their seats.

faqs.question: What are the popular courses at DMIHER?
faqs.answer: Datta Meghe Institute of Higher Education and Research offers various undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral levels in the fields of Engineering, Business & Management Studies, Science, and Computer Applications. Admission to the courses is both merit and entrance-based. Admission to MBBS is based on a valid score in NEET entrance examination. Courses such as MSc requires to have a valid performance in the last qualfying exam (merit-based).

highlights.description: One of India’s leading institutes is DMIHER. It has been consistently recognised by numerous national ranking agencies. As per the NIRF 2025, the institute ranked #84 under Overall category, #49 under University, #20 under Medical, and #36 under Dental. DMIHER excellence in academics, distinguished professors, and well-established infrastructure is the reason for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. All the information around DMIHER rankings is covered in the following article:

rankings.highlight: 2nd Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Maharashtra In 2025
6th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Maharashtra In 2025
Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Maharashtra In 2025
5th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Maharashtra In 2025

nirf.description:
Based on the rankings from NIRF, DMIHER outperformed numerous other institutes, securing a higher position, indicating that the institute is considered to be doing better in various factors evaluated by the NIRF ranking system. In the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have displayed instability in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2025, DMIHER fell 13 ranks to #84 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been observed that the institute has displayed a decreasing trend in the 'University' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, DMIHER fell 7 ranks to #49 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
In the 'Medical' category, the institute's ranks have ascended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, DMIHER climbed 3 ranks to #20 rank in the 'Medical' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
The institute's ranks in the 'Dental' category; have descended when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, DMIHER fell 12 ranks to #36 rank in the 'Dental' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.
Read less

reviews.review_heading: Excellent College in Wardha.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very average, to be honest. It's a small campus, and the classrooms are average. The computer labs are a shambles, but it doesn't matter much when you carry your own laptops. However, the Wi-Fi availability is bad; there is no Wi-Fi available, just lies. There are ACs for first-year students, though, and hopefully, all years will get them soon.

reviews.review_heading: My experience at Datta Meghe Institute.
reviews.review_text: the infrastructure at DMCP is excellent, offering state-of-the art facilities like bell-equipped laboratories, a comprehensive library digital classroom and modern research facilities there are separate hostels for boys and girls, and facilities such as gym cafeteria and sports complex are available to support physical well-being and leisure activities.

reviews.review_heading: Review for the college : Datta Meghe college of pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are spacious and digital, including smart boards and projectors, which facilitate interactive learning . The laboratories of our college are well equipped and have all the latest equipment required for the practicals of students . Beside this, there is a library, which is also a digital library, which fosters us with a wide range of resources for study .

reviews.review_heading: Review of Datta Meghe college of pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is renovating day by day and our classrooms are digital classrooms with smart boards . Our labs are well equipped and have all the latest equipment required for the practical . Our college also has sports grounds for students to fulfill their hobbies.

reviews.review_heading: Fully satisfied with the college and the facilities they provide.
reviews.review_text: We have every facility like Wi-Fi, research labs, and a library, and along with this, our college supports other activities like cultural events and games, including both indoor and outdoor sports. We also have hostels that provide every facility that a student wants, such as reading and studying purposes. We have a reading room, and in every room, we have our own Wi-Fi available. If there are any problems, we have QR codes available everywhere, which we can scan to register complaints, and they...

reviews.review_heading: College review of Datta Meghe Institute of Higher Education and Research.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is developing. The classrooms are spacious and digitally enhanced with smart boards. Specialized labs are well equipped to provide hands-on experience that is crucial for technical subjects. The college library offers an extensive collection of books, journals, and magazines in a quiet and conducive environment for study. The hostel rooms are designed for two or three students and have essential furniture, including a study table, bed, and wardrobe. A special st...

college_info.college_name: DMIHER Scholarship Details

paragraphs: The below-mentioned is the application fee details for some courses:

Datta Meghe Institute of Higher Education and Research MCA fee is about 90,000 annually and for 2 years it is about 1,80,000. DMIHER's on-campus MCA fee is not available on its official website. You can contact the admissions office for more information. You should have a bachelor's degree in computer Science or computer applications with a minimum of 50% marks and should have Maths in 12th grade. The programme focuses on the development and implementation of practical information system applications and provides a basic grounding in the fundamentals of computer science. Email or phone the admissions office for the latest information on MCA on campus and MCA fees.

DMIHER Online’s courses are relatively affordable. The MBA programme is offered by DMIMS through its affiliated institute Datta Meghe Institute of Higher Education and Research (DMIHER), which is available online. The fee for the MBA will be around Rs. 2,20,000 per annum, which is low compared to other colleges in the vicinity. The college may also charge a registration fee of Rs. 5,000. The fee for the MBA only includes the tuition fees. The college may charge additional fees for hostel, examination, placement, etc. Contact the admissions office of DMIHER to find out about the availability and fees of on-campus MBA programs. It would be better to research the MBA programme fees of other universities in your vicinity or in your preferred location.

review_summary.college_name: Francis Xavier Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: This college is fantastic in every way.

content.Placements: Approximately 70–80 percent of students are accepted into our college. 15 LPA is the maximum compensation package available. 3.5 LPA is the lowest package available. Zoho, Infosys, and numerous more well-known recruiting firms come to our college. In my course, almost 68 percent of students landed internships at organizations like Skill Rank. Front-end and software development are among the top positions available.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure at my college appears more organic. All employees and students have access to the Wi-Fi. Classrooms and labs appear tidy. The library appears serene and lovely as well. My college's hostel amenities, delicious meals, and round-the-clock medical services are all excellent. Sports Day and numerous other events are organized by the administration for the students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the college. The college provides good placements.

content.Placements: 80% of students are placed in our college. The highest package is 12 LPA and the lowest package is 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies of our course are TCS and Spiders. 75% of students got internships from our course. The top role offered in our courses is web development.
content.Infrastructure: There is almost a good infrastructure and facilities available in our college for our course and department. The quality of the hostel facilities is good. The food available in the mess and canteen seems to be good and hygienic. It is available when required.

individual_reviews.title: Review of Francis Xavier Engineering College.

content.Placements: Around 40-50% of students got placed in previous batch with the highest salary package of 18 LPA. The lowest package offered is 3 LPA. Top Recruiting companies are Infosys, Wipro, and Zoho. Students who scored 7.5 CGPA in our course got placed at companies like Infosys and Wipro. content.Infrastructure: Our college has good infrastructure in the main place (Vannarpettai ) with a bus facility. They provide Wi-Fi for all labs and departments. There are 21 labs in our college. Classrooms are very neat. There is a library with all engineering books. The hostel is small but it has good rooms and bathrooms. We have a volleyball court in the center of the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: This college is fantastic in every way.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at my college appears more organic. All employees and students have access to the Wi-Fi. Classrooms and labs appear tidy. The library appears serene and lovely as well. My college's hostel amenities, delicious meals, and round-the-clock medical services are all excellent. Sports Day and numerous other events are organized by the administration for the students.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college. The college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: There is almost a good infrastructure and facilities available in our college for our course and department. The quality of the hostel facilities is good. The food available in the mess and canteen seems to be good and hygienic. It is available when required.

reviews.review_heading: A college that offers earns while you learn.
reviews.review_text: Most classrooms are fitted with projectors, smartboards, and audio visual systems to facilitate interactive learning. The computer lab provides high-speed internet and the latest software. The library provides a quiet and comfortable space. Students can connect to their laptops.

reviews.review_heading: A college that offers a quality education with career opportunities.
reviews.review_text: In my college, the infrastructure looks more natural. The Wi-Fi is accessible for all students and staff. Labs and classrooms look clean. The library also looks peaceful and beautiful. The hostel facilities in my college, the food quality is good and also tasty and then 24/7 medical facilities. The management conducts sports day and many more activities for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Francis Xavier Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure in the main place (Vannarpettai ) with a bus facility. They provide Wi-Fi for all labs and departments. There are 21 labs in our college. Classrooms are very neat. There is a library with all engineering books. The hostel is small but it has good rooms and bathrooms. We have a volleyball court in the center of the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Review about my Francis Xavier Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good and well-trained staffs are there. The infrastructure in every classroom is fixed with Wi-Fi and the labs are full of scientists to gain everyone's knowledge. There are many libraries in each department and a specific block for the library.

reviews.review_heading: A good and trustworthy review about college from student who is pursuing degree at the same college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and the structure of the infrastructure are pretty good. There is Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms with projectors, and a library that has free access to IEEE. There is seperate building available for library that make us feel peaceful while reading books in library.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Francis Xavier Engineering College, Tirunelveli.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are well-knowledgeable and skill training persons. My department, Artificial Intelligence, and Machine Learning are fixed with applied labs to gain more creativity and knowledge. Wi-Fi is available in classrooms for daily assessment tests. The hostel quality is good, with rooms where 4 students can stay.

reviews.review_heading: Francis Xavier Engineering College review.
reviews.review_text: Facilities of the FX Engineering College are well with good campus and good staff with excellent classrooms. Library is available for each department and a block for library and the hostel facilities are perfect and the food is also good enough. Canteen has fresh snacks and food. The extracurricular activities are also conducted with good PT masters making practices daily.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied by the top-class placement and quality of education.
reviews.review_text: The atmosphere on our campus is pleasant, and the staff is kind and compassionate. The classrooms have open windows and are spacious and bright. IBM labs are very good, and there are other state-of-the-art labs. This place serves good, healthy food. The hotel room is clean, and everything is nice. The grounds are immaculate, and the rooms are well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with previous placements and campus facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and services available for our courses and department are such that we have all the needs, such as Wi-Fi, library, laboratory, and video classrooms as well. Our hostel facilities are excellent, and the food in the restaurant and canteen is excellent.

reviews.review_heading: Long dreamed course of mine.
reviews.review_text: Firstly, we are asked to wear a uniform every Monday and Friday. The lab coats are given to teachers and students. Students wear coats only during practical labs. We won't encouraged to play sports apart from hectic class. There are 102 seats allotted for MBA students.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the faculty, but campus life is disappointing.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is in moderate condition. The classrooms in our college should be enlarged because they are congested. Wi-Fi is available all over our campus, but it should be free for students, as it is password-protected. The library is important, and it is wide enough to satisfy the students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Francis Xavier Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The atmosphere of our college was very good, and we have very friendly faculty members and good teachers. We also have a big space to play cricket volleyball, and every month they conduct competitions for extracurricular activities. We also have a gym as well as two big libraries.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for MCA.
reviews.review_text: The atmosphere at our campus is pleasant, and the staff members are kind and compassionate. The classrooms have open windows and are spacious and light. The IBM laboratories are excellent, and there are other cutting-edge technology labs. This place serves good, healthful food. The hostel's accommodations are clean, and everything tastes good. The grounds are immaculate, and the rooms are kept up.
